title: |
  ![](logo_blk.png){width=5in}  
  PERCH - Paper figures and tests
author: "Ceylan Tanes"
date: \today
output: 
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

```{r knitr setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(
  tidy=FALSE,
  cache=FALSE,
  echo=FALSE,
  warning=FALSE,
  message=FALSE,
  dpi=100,
  fig.width=5,
  fig.height=3,
  fig.align = "center"
  )
```

```{r child = 'Shotgun_preamble.Rmd'}
```


```{r}
### protein alignments 
prot_align_dir <- file.path(data_dir, "sbx_gene_family")

# download these files to local computer 
#ec_fp <- "/mnt/isilon/microbiome/analysis/biodata/kegg-download-20190228/ec.list"
#ko_ec_fp <- "/mnt/isilon/microbiome/analysis/biodata/kegg-download-20190228/ftp.bioinformatics.jp/kegg/genes/ko/ko_enzyme.list"
#butyrate_info_fp <- "/mnt/isilon/microbiome/analysis/biodata/butyrate/butyrate_20180612_gene_info_full.tsv"
ec_fp <- "/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/kegg/ec.list"
ko_ec_fp <- "/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/kegg/ko_enzyme.list"
butyrate_info_fp <- "/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/butyrate/butyrate_20180612_gene_info_full.tsv"
```

```{r}
read_gene_aln_results <- function(base_dir, s, taxon_info=F) {
  gene_results <- data_frame(FileName = list.files(
    base_dir, pattern="*_1.txt")) %>%
    group_by(FileName) %>%
    mutate(fileSize = file.info(file.path(base_dir, FileName))$size) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(fileSize > 25) %>% # delete empty files
    group_by(FileName) %>%
    do(read.delim(file.path(base_dir, .$FileName), stringsAsFactors = F)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(SampleID = sub("_1.txt", "", FileName, perl=T)) %>%
    select(-FileName) 
  
  if (taxon_info) {
    gene_results %>%
      right_join(select(s, SampleID), by="SampleID") %>%
      complete(SampleID, nesting(geneID, taxon), fill = list(count=0)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(geneID)) 
  } else {
    gene_results %>%
      group_by(SampleID, geneID) %>%
      summarize(count = sum(count)) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      
      right_join(select(s, SampleID), by="SampleID") %>%
      complete(SampleID, geneID, fill = list(count=0)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(geneID))
  }
  
}
```



```{r}
#read in the KEGG data
kegg <- read_gene_aln_results(file.path(prot_align_dir, "20190228_kegg_species_prokaryotes"), s, taxon_info=F) %>%
  group_by(SampleID) %>%
  mutate(kegg_counts = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(props = count/kegg_counts)
```


```{r kegg beta diversity}
kegg_matrix <- usedist::pivot_to_numeric_matrix(kegg, SampleID, geneID, props)
bc_kegg <- vegdist(kegg_matrix)
```

```{r}
ko_info <- read_delim("/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/kegg/ko.list", delim = "\t", col_names = F) %>%
  setNames(c("geneID", "gene_name")) %>%
  mutate(geneID = sub("ko:", "", geneID))
```


```{r}
ko2path <- read_delim("/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/kegg/pathway_ko.list", col_names = F, delim = "\t") %>%
  setNames(c("path", "geneID")) %>%
  filter(grepl("map", path)) %>%
  mutate(geneID = sub("ko:", "", geneID)) %>%
  mutate(path = sub("path:", "", path))

path_list <- read_delim("/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/kegg/prokaryotic_pathway.list", col_names = F, delim = "\t") %>%
  setNames(c("path", "path_name")) %>%
  mutate(path = paste0("map", path))


path_abundances <- kegg %>%
  left_join(ko2path, by="geneID") %>%
  group_by(SampleID, path) %>%
  summarize(props = sum(props)) %>%
  right_join(path_list, by="path") ## it's a right join because we only want to keep the prok pathways

## calculate the number of genes in each pathway for enrichment analysis
num_gene_universe <- length(unique(kegg$geneID))

num_genes_in_pathway <- ko2path %>%
  filter(geneID %in% unique(kegg$geneID)) %>%
  group_by(path) %>%
  summarize(num_genes_in_path = n()) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r}
vfdb_annot <- read_delim("/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/VFDB/20250519_vfdb/20250519_VFDB_setB_pro.txt") 

h_flu_vfdb <- vfdb_annot %>%
  filter(grepl("Haemophilus influenzae", taxon)) %>%
  pull(geneID) %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.character()


vfdb_annot <- vfdb_annot %>%
  distinct(geneID, group)
  

#read in the VFDB data
vfdb <- read_gene_aln_results(file.path(prot_align_dir, "20250519_VFDB_setB_pro"), s, taxon_info=F) %>%
  group_by(SampleID) %>%
  mutate(total_counts = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(total_counts > 0) %>%
  left_join(select(s, SampleID, nonhost), by="SampleID") %>%
  #mutate(props = count/total_counts)
  mutate(props = count/nonhost)

vfdb_groups <- vfdb %>%
  left_join(vfdb_annot, by="geneID")
```


# Main analysis: NPOP only

```{r}
## Subset the metadata file to only keep the samples you would like to test on
s_npop <- s %>%
  filter(Keep) %>%
  filter(!isControl) %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% "NPOP VTM") %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  
  mutate(study_group = factor(study_group)) %>%
  mutate(study_group = fct_relevel(study_group, "Control without RTI", after=0)) %>%
  
  mutate(age_group = factor(age_group, levels=c("0-5 months", "6-11 months", "12-23 months", "24-59 months"))) %>%
  mutate(age_group_linear = factor(age_group, ordered=T)) %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_collapse = fct_recode(study_group_collapse, Control="Community control", Pneumonia="Case")) %>%
  mutate(study_group_collapse = factor(study_group_collapse, levels=c("Control", "Pneumonia"))) %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_collapse_control = fct_collapse(study_group, Control=c("Control without RTI", "Control with RTI"))) %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_death = ifelse(death %in% "Yes", "Death", as.character(study_group_collapse_control))) %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = factor(study_group_death, levels=c(levels(.$study_group_collapse_control), "Death"))) %>%
  
  left_join(etiology_clean, by="subject_id") %>%
  mutate(pathogen_clean = ifelse(is.na(etiology_75), as.character(study_group), etiology_75)) %>%
  mutate(pathogen_clean = fct_other(pathogen_clean, keep=c("Control without RTI", "Control with RTI", "RSV", "HMPV_A_B", "PARA_3"))) %>%
  
  left_join(etiology_entropy, by="subject_id") %>%
  
  mutate(is_RSV = ifelse(pathogen_clean %in% "RSV", "RSV", "not RSV")) %>%
  mutate(isDeath = study_group_death %in% "Death") %>%
  
  mutate(malnutrition_baseline = factor(malnutrition_baseline, levels=c("Normal or overweight", "Moderate malnutrition", "Severe malnutrition"))) %>%
  mutate(malnutrition_baseline_all = malnutrition_baseline) %>%
  mutate(malnutrition_baseline = fct_collapse(malnutrition_baseline, Malnutrition = c("Moderate malnutrition", "Severe malnutrition"))) 

## Set colors for each factor ahead of time so they are consistent through the report.
ann_colors = list(
  #study_group = factor_palette(s_toTest$study_group, as.character(NatParksPalettes::natparks.pals("Acadia", 9))[c(3,1,7,9)]),
  age_group = factor_palette(s_npop$age_group, viridis(length(unique(s_npop$age_group)), end=0.8) ),
  #study_group_collapse = factor_palette(s_npop$study_group_collapse, c("#779FA1", "#CF5C36")),
  study_group_collapse_control = factor_palette(s_npop$study_group_collapse_control, c("#CC6677", "#88CCEE", "#0077BB")),
  study_group_death = factor_palette(s_npop$study_group_death, c("#CC6677", "#88CCEE", "#0077BB", "#BEC100"))
)
#c("#429EA6", "#DB995A", "#7F3044", "#939673")

## Change this to be the breakdown of whatever variable the collaborator is interested in
addmargins(table(s_npop$study_group_death, s_npop$study_group, useNA = "ifany")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf)

addmargins(table(s_npop$study_group_death, s_npop$current_abx, useNA = "ifany")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf)


#addmargins(table(s_npop$study_group_death, s_npop$abx_new, useNA = "ifany")) %>%
#  pander(split.table=Inf)

addmargins(table(s_npop$study_group_death, s_npop$malnutrition_baseline, useNA = "ifany")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf)
```


```{r}
props_toTest_npop <- summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>%
  right_join(s_npop, by="SampleID")  %>%
  group_by(Taxa, study_group) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = mean(props > 0)) %>%
  mutate(mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(max_mean_prop = max(mean_prop)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(max_mean_prop > 0.01) %>%
  # We only want the species level assignments
  filter(!Taxa %in% c("Bacteria", "Bacillota Streptococcus", "Bacillota Staphylococcus", "Pseudomonadota Haemophilus")) %>% 
  filter(!Taxa %in% c("Bacteria")) %>% 
  
  mutate(props_original = props) %>%
  mutate(props = props + min(filter(., props>0)$props) / 10) %>%
  mutate(props_log = log10(props))
```



```{r}
genes_npop <- kegg %>%
  right_join(s_npop, by="SampleID") %>%
  
  group_by(geneID) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = mean(props > 0)) %>%
  mutate(mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  #summarize(perc_present = mean(props > 0), mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(perc_present > 0.9) %>%
  filter(mean_prop > 1e-4) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  
  mutate(props_original = props) %>%
  mutate(props = props + min(filter(., props>0)$props) / 10) %>%
  mutate(props_log = log10(props)) %>%
  
  left_join(ko_info, by="geneID")
```


# Figure 1: Development of microbiome in healthy subjects


```{r}
s_toTest <- s_npop %>%
  filter(study_group_collapse == "Control") %>%
  droplevels()
```


```{r}
table(s_toTest$study_group, s_toTest$current_abx)
```



## Fig1A Alpha diversity

```{r fig.width=8}
s_toTest %>%
  pivot_longer(c("Richness", "Shannon"), names_to="metric", values_to="alpha") %>%
  mutate(age_groups= fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=age_groups, y=alpha, color=age_group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(aes(shape=study_group)) +
    facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 0.75,
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="",
      y="Alpha diversity value"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1A_alpha.pdf", height=3, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```


Richness ~ study_group + age_group_linear

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(Richness ~ study_group + age_group_linear, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```




Shannon ~ study_group + age_group_linear

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(Shannon ~ study_group + age_group_linear, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```



Shannon ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(Shannon ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```

For each age group: Shannon ~ bf_current + study_group

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(Shannon ~ bf_current + study_group, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```



Shannon ~ study_group + age_group


```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(alpha ~ age_group, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(Shannon ~ study_group + age_group, data=.), "age_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term))

  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```


## Fig1B Beta diversity Kraken

```{r}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  pcoaplus(bc) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
pc_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=age_group, shape=study_group)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse() +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=age_group)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="")

ggsave("perch_Fig1B_pcoa_NPOP_age.pdf", height=2, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```


Only for the control group:  distmat ~ study_group + age_group

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ study_group + age_group,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = age_group, alpha = 1)) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq")))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```




Only for the control group:  distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  filter(!is.na(bf_current)) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = age_group, alpha = 1)) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq")))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```


Only for the control group:  distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  filter(!is.na(bf_current)) %>%
  do(adonisplus(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999)) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq")))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```


## Fig1C Beta diversity KEGG

```{r}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  pcoaplus(bc_kegg) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()

bind_rows(pc_df %>% 
  select(SampleID, Axis.1, Axis.2, age_group, study_group) %>% mutate(shape2 = "Data"),
  centroids %>% mutate(shape2 = "Centroids")
) %>%
  write.table(file="test_PCoA_data.txt", row.names=F, quote=F, sep='\t')

pc_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=age_group, shape=study_group)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse() +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=age_group)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="")

ggsave("perch_Fig1C_pcoa_NPOP_age_kegg.pdf", height=2, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```


Only for the control group:  distmat ~ study_group + age_group

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  #group_by(sample_type) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc_kegg, formula = distmat ~ study_group + age_group,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = age_group, alpha = 1)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) 

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```


Only for the control group:  distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  filter(!is.na(bf_current)) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc_kegg, formula = distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = age_group, alpha = 1)) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq")))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```


Only for the control group:  distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  filter(!is.na(bf_current)) %>%
  do(adonisplus(
    ., distmat = bc_kegg, formula = distmat ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999)) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq")))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```



## Fig1D Differential abundance

```{r}
props_toTest <- props_toTest_npop %>%
  filter(study_group %in% c("Control without RTI", "Control with RTI")) %>%
  droplevels() 
```


props_log ~ study_group + age_group_linear

```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ study_group + age_group_linear, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1) %>%
#  column_spec(c(1:2), width = "15em")
```




```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  ## we don't care about the quadratic or cubic terms (None are q<0.1 anyways)
  filter(term == "age_group_linear.L") %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log increase with age",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
```


```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  ## we don't care about the quadratic or cubic terms (None are q<0.1 anyways)
  #filter(term == "age_group_linear.L") %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  arrange(Taxa, term) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_reorder(Taxa, estimate, .fun = `[`, 1)) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  mutate(term = factor(term)) %>%
  mutate(term = fct_recode(term, `Linear term`="age_group_linear.L", `Quadratic term`="age_group_linear.Q")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=term)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error),  position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("gray10", "gray70")) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log increase with age",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1D_diffAb_withQuadratic.pdf", height=4.8, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```



## Fig1E Select taxa associated with age

Focus on a few bacteria across the age groups

```{r fig.height=8}
props_toTest %>%
  
  #filter(Taxa %in% c("Actinomycetota Bifidobacterium longum", "Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius", "Pseudomonadota Moraxella nonliquefaciens", "Bacteroidota Prevotella melaninogenica","Pseudomonadota Neisseria meningitidis" )) %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% c("Actinomycetota Bifidobacterium longum", "Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius", "Pseudomonadota Moraxella nonliquefaciens", "Bacteroidota Prevotella histicola")) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(age_groups = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_groups, y=props, color=age_group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(aes(shape=study_group)) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol = 2, scales="free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      aspect.ratio = 0.75
    ) +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1E_select_taxa.pdf", height=5.2, width=7, useDingbats=F)
```


props_log ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear

```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ bf_current + study_group + age_group_linear, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("bf_current", "no BF - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1) %>%
#  column_spec(c(1:2), width = "15em")
```



```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  ## we don't care about the quadratic or cubic terms (None are q<0.1 anyways)
  #filter(term == "age_group_linear.L") %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  arrange(Taxa, term) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_reorder(Taxa, estimate, .fun = `[`, 1)) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  mutate(term = factor(term)) %>%
  mutate(term = fct_recode(term, `Linear term`="age_group_linear.L", `Quadratic term`="age_group_linear.Q")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=term)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error),  position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("gray10", "gray70", "red")) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log increase with age",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig1D_diffAb_bf.pdf", height=4.8, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```


## Supp Fig2A

```{r}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  filter(!is.na(bf_current)) %>%
  pcoaplus(bc) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group, bf_current) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
pc_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=age_group, shape=bf_current)) +
    geom_point(alpha=1) +
    #stat_ellipse() +
    #geom_point(data=centroids, shape=8, stroke=1.5, size=3) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(15,0)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    theme(
      legend.position="bottom"
    ) +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="")

ggsave("perch_SuppFig2A_pcoa_NPOP_bf.pdf", height=3, width=7.8, useDingbats=F)
```


Only for the control group:  distmat ~ study_group + age_group

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  filter(age_group %in% c("12-23 months")) %>%
  do(adonisplus(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ study_group + bf_current,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999)) %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq")))

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```



## Supp Fig2B

props_log ~ study_group + bf_current

```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  filter(age_group %in% c("12-23 months")) %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ study_group + bf_current, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("bf_current", "no BF - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1) %>%
#  column_spec(c(1:2), width = "15em")
```



```{r fig.height=8}
props_toTest %>%
  filter(!is.na(bf_current)) %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% (summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1) %>% pull(Taxa) %>% unique())) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(age_groups = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_groups, y=props, color=age_group, shape=bf_current)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol = 2, scales="free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(15,0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      aspect.ratio = 0.75
    ) +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_SuppFig2B_diffAb_bf.pdf", height=6, width=7, useDingbats=F)
```




## Fig1F Pathways

```{r}
genes_toTest <- genes_npop %>%
  filter(study_group %in% c("Control without RTI", "Control with RTI")) %>%
  droplevels() 
```



props_log ~ study_group + age_group_linear

```{r}
summaries_df <- genes_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(geneID, gene_name) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ study_group + age_group_linear, data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>% ### Or whatever the reference level is
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```



```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
## find the pathways the fdr<0.1 genes are in
sig_genes <- summaries_df %>%
  #(grepl("age_group", term)) %>%
  filter(term %in% "age_group_linear.L") %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1)  %>%
  droplevels()
  
temp <- sig_genes %>%
  left_join(ko2path, by="geneID") %>%
  filter(path %in% path_list$path) %>%
  filter(!is.na(path))
  
```

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
enrichment_tests <- temp %>%
  mutate(gene_name = paste(geneID, gene_name)) %>%
  group_by(path) %>%
  summarize(num_sig_genes = n(), 
            genes = paste(gene_name, collapse = ", "), 
            num_pos = sum(estimate>0), 
            num_neg = sum(estimate<0)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(num_genes_in_pathway, by="path") %>%
  filter(num_genes_in_path > 1) %>%
  filter(num_sig_genes > 1) %>%
  mutate(p.value = 1 - phyper(num_sig_genes, num_genes_in_path, num_gene_universe-num_genes_in_path, nrow(sig_genes))) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  left_join(path_list, by="path") %>%
  mutate(perc_sig = num_sig_genes/num_genes_in_path) %>%
  mutate(path_text = paste0(num_pos, "+;", num_neg, "-"))


enrichment_tests %>%
  filter(fdr<0.05) %>%
  mutate(path_name = reorder(path_name, perc_sig)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = perc_sig, y=path_name, fill=num_sig_genes)) +
    geom_bar(stat="identity") +
    geom_text(aes(label=path_text), nudge_x = 0.07, size=3) +
    scale_fill_viridis(trans="log10", option="magma", end=0.8) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, breaks=c(0,0.25,0.5,0.75,1)) +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      x= "Percent of genes in pathway\ncorrelated with age groups",
      y="", fill="Number of\ngenes\nFDR<0.1"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1F_pathway_enrichments.pdf", height=6, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


## Fig1G LPS and galactose metabolism

```{r}
temp %>% 
  filter(path %in% "map00540") %>%
  
  separate(gene_name, into=c("gene_name", "desc"), sep=';') %>%
  
  mutate(gene_name = reorder(gene_name, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=gene_name, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1Ga_lps.pdf", height=3, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```

```{r eval=F}
temp %>% 
  filter(path %in% "map00650") %>%
  
  separate(gene_name, into=c("gene_name", "desc"), sep=';') %>%
  
  mutate(gene_name = reorder(gene_name, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=gene_name, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1Gb_butanoate.pdf", height=2.6, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r}
temp %>% 
  filter(path %in% "map00052") %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_name)) %>%
  
  separate(gene_name, into=c("gene_name", "desc"), sep=';') %>%
  
  
  mutate(gene_name = reorder(gene_name, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=gene_name, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1Gb_galactose.pdf", height=2.6, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```


## Fig1H Maturity index

Only control subjects without malnutrition are used for the training set.

Bacteria with >0.5% mean relative abundance are used

```{r}
library(randomForest)
s_mat_healthy <- s_npop %>%
  filter(study_group %in% c("Control without RTI", "Control with RTI")) %>%
  filter(malnutrition_baseline %in% "Normal or overweight") %>%
  #filter(study_group %in% c("Control without RTI")) %>%
  droplevels()

s_mat_pneumonia <- s_npop %>%
  filter(study_group_collapse %in% c("Pneumonia") | grepl("Malnutrition", malnutrition_baseline)) %>%
  filter(death %in% "No") %>%
  droplevels()


taxa_of_interest <- summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_mat_healthy$SampleID) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  #mutate(perc_present = mean(props > 0)) %>%
  summarize(mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(mean_prop > 0.005) %>%
  # We only want the species level assignments
  filter(!Taxa %in% c("Bacteria", "Bacillota Streptococcus", "Bacillota Staphylococcus", "Pseudomonadota Neisseria")) %>%
  pull(Taxa)


rf_data <-  summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>%  
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_of_interest) %>%
  select(SampleID, Taxa, props) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = gsub(" ", "_", Taxa)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = gsub("-", "_", Taxa)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "Taxa", values_from = "props", values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "SampleID")


training_data <- rf_data[s_mat_healthy$SampleID,]
testing_data <- rf_data[s_mat_pneumonia$SampleID,]


```

```{r}
set.seed(42)
rf_model <- randomForest(s_mat_healthy$age_months ~ ., data = training_data, importance=T, ntree=10000)
print(rf_model)
```



```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
training_df <- tibble(SampleID = names(rf_model$predicted), MMI = as.vector(rf_model$predicted), actual_age = as.vector(rf_model$y)) %>%
  left_join(select(s_toTest, SampleID, study_group, study_group_collapse, age_group, malnutrition_baseline, malnutrition_baseline_all, current_abx))

# nls = nonlinear least squares
# SSlogis = Self-starting logistic model

mod1 = nls(MMI ~ SSlogis(actual_age, Asym, xmid, scal), data=training_df)
# mod1

training_df %>%
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x=actual_age, y=MMI)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape=study_group)) +
    geom_smooth(
      method = "nls", formula = y ~ SSlogis(x, Asym, xmid, scal),
      se = FALSE, color="gray30"
    ) +
    #annotate(geom="text", x=0, y=40, label=paste("Logistic curve for controls:\nHoriz. asymptote=", round(mod1$m$getPars()['Asym'],2), "\nxmid=", round(mod1$m$getPars()['xmid'],2), "\nscale=", round(mod1$m$getPars()['scal'],2)), hjust = 0) +
    #scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$study_group_collapse) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0,60)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,45)) +
    theme_clean() +
    coord_equal() +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      y = "Predicted age", shape="",
      x = "Actual age", color=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1H_MMI.pdf", height=3, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```


## Fig1I Random forest stats

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
imp <- importance(rf_model, type = 1)
imp_df <- tibble(Taxa = dimnames(imp)[[1]], MeanDecAccu = as.vector(imp)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, MeanDecAccu)) %>%
  arrange(-MeanDecAccu)

library(randomForestExplainer)

min_depth_frame <- min_depth_distribution(rf_model)
#plot_min_depth_distribution(min_depth_frame)
min_depth_frame_df <- min_depth_frame %>%
  rename(Taxa = variable) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  summarize(mean_depth = mean(minimal_depth)) %>%
  ungroup() 
```


```{r}
imp_df %>%
  head(n=15) %>%
  left_join(min_depth_frame_df, by="Taxa") %>%
  mutate(Taxa = sub("Pseudomonadota_|Bacteroidota_|Bacillota_|Actinomycetota_", "", Taxa)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = gsub("_", " ", Taxa)) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(cols=-Taxa) %>%
  mutate(name = sub("MeanDecAccu", "Mean decrease in accuracy", name)) %>%
  mutate(name = sub("mean_depth", "Mean minimum depth", name)) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_reorder(Taxa, value, .fun = `[`, 1)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=value, y=Taxa)) +
    geom_point() +
    facet_wrap(~name, scales="free_x") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #aspect.ratio = 1
    ) +
    labs(
      x="", y=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig1I_MMI_taxa.pdf", height=3.2, width=7, useDingbats=F)
```






```{r eval=F}
temp_rf_data <-  summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>% 
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(mean_prop > 0.001) %>%
  
  select(SampleID, Taxa, props) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = gsub(" ", "_", Taxa)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = gsub("-", "_", Taxa)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "Taxa", values_from = "props", values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "SampleID")


temp_training_data <- rf_data[s_mat_healthy$SampleID,]


cross_validate <- rfcv(temp_training_data, s_mat_healthy$age_months, step=2)

cross_validate$error.cv %>%
  enframe(name = "n.var", value="error.cv") %>%
  mutate(n.var = as.numeric(n.var)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=n.var, y=error.cv)) +
    geom_point()
```








# Figure 2: Microbiome changes in pneumonia

```{r}
s_toTest <- s_npop %>%
  filter(death == "No") %>%
  droplevels()
```


## Fig 2A Alpha diversity

```{r fig.width=8}
s_toTest %>%
  mutate(xlabel = fct_relabel(study_group_collapse_control, function (x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=xlabel, y=Shannon, color=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(aes(shape=current_abx)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.9, 5)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1.25,
      legend.position = "bottom") +
    guides(color="none", shape="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="Antibiotics",
      y="Shannon diversity"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig2A_alpha.pdf", height=3, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```





For each age group: Shannon ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(Shannon ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



Only for kids <1 year of age: Shannon ~ is_RSV + current_abx + study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  filter(age_group %in% c("0-5 months", "6-11 months")) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(Shannon ~ is_RSV + current_abx + study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```




Shannon ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(Shannon ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) 

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```





## Fig 2B Dysbiosis score

```{r}
s_toTest %>%
  mutate(xlabel = fct_relabel(study_group_collapse_control, function (x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=xlabel, y=median_dysbiosis, color=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    geom_quasirandom(aes(shape=current_abx)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.49, 1.05)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1.25
      #axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      #legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    guides(color="none", shape="none") +
    labs(
      x="",
      y="Dysbiosis score"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig2B_dysbiosis.pdf", height=3, width=6.1, useDingbats=F)
```



For each age group: median_dysbiosis ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(median_dysbiosis ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



For each age group (for the subjects <12 months old): median_dysbiosis ~ is_RSV + current_abx + study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  filter(age_group %in% c("0-5 months", "6-11 months")) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(median_dysbiosis ~ is_RSV + current_abx + study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



median_dysbiosis ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(alpha ~ study_group, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(median_dysbiosis ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) 

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```



## Fig 2C Beta diversity


```{r  fig.height=2, fig.width=10}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  pcoaplus(bc) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_collapse_control) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
pc_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=study_group_collapse_control, shape=current_abx)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse() +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="", fill="")

ggsave("perch_Fig2C_pcoa_NPOP.pdf", height=2, width=7.5, useDingbats=F)
```



For each age group: distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = study_group_collapse_control, alpha = 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()


# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  select(-term)%>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



distmat ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  #group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = study_group_collapse_control, alpha = 1)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%

  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) 

# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```


## Fig 2D Beta diversity: KEGG

```{r  fig.height=2, fig.width=10}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  pcoaplus(bc_kegg) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_collapse_control) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
pc_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=study_group_collapse_control, shape=current_abx)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
    #stat_ellipse() +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="", fill="")

ggsave("perch_Fig2D_pcoa_NPOP_kegg.pdf", height=2, width=7.5, useDingbats=F)
```


For each age group: distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = study_group_collapse_control, alpha = 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()


# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  select(-term)%>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```

distmat ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  #group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + age_group + study_group_collapse_control,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = study_group_collapse_control, alpha = 1)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%

  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) 

# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```


## Fig 2E Control - Pneumonia diff abundance

```{r}
props_toTest <- props_toTest_npop %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_toTest$SampleID) %>%
  droplevels() 
```



For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse


```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse_control", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("abx", term)) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    #facet_wrap(~term) +
    scale_color_manual(values=unname(ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control)[c(2,3)]) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig2E_diffAb2.pdf", height=4, width=9, useDingbats=F)
```

For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + is_RSV + study_group_collapse


```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  filter(age_group %in% c("0-5 months", "6-11 months")) %>%
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + is_RSV + study_group_collapse_control, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse_control", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("abx", term)) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=age_group, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_wrap(~term) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
```


## Fig 2F Select taxa

```{r fig.height=8}
props_toTest %>%
  
  filter(Taxa %in% c("Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius", "Bacillota Streptococcus parasanguinis", "Pseudomonadota Enterobacteriaceae", "Bacillota Streptococcus pneumoniae")) %>%
  #filter(Taxa %in% c("Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius", "Pseudomonadota Enterobacteriaceae")) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(age_groups = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_groups, y=props, color=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(size=0.9, dodge.width=0.75, aes(shape=current_abx, group=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10", limits = c(9e-9, 15)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      
    ) +
    #guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig2F_select_taxa.pdf", height=4.7, width=5.8, useDingbats=F)
```



## Supp fig XX: Vaccination

```{r}
props_toTest <- props_toTest_npop %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_toTest$SampleID) %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% c("Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae", "Bacillota Streptococcus pneumoniae")) %>%
  mutate(vaccination_status = ifelse(Taxa %in% "Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae", Haemophilus_influenzae_typeB_vaccine, Pneumococcal_conjugate_vaccine)) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  mutate(vaccination_status = factor(vaccination_status)) %>%
  mutate(vaccination_status = fct_collapse(vaccination_status, Vaccinated = c("Fully vaccinated", "Partially vaccinated"))) 
```


```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
props_toTest %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=props, color=study_group_collapse_control, shape=vaccination_status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10") +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa) +
    theme_clean()
ggsave("perch_Supp_FigX_vaccine.pdf", height=3, width=13, useDingbats=F)
```


## Fig 2H KEGG

```{r}
genes_toTest <- genes_npop %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_toTest$SampleID) %>%
  droplevels() 
```


For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- genes_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(geneID, gene_name, age_group) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse_control", "Control - ", term)) %>% ### Or whatever the reference level is
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```



```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=8}
## find the pathways the fdr<0.1 genes are in
sig_genes <- summaries_df %>%
  filter(grepl("Control", term)) %>%
  #filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%
  # it so happened that all the fdr<0.1 ones were control - very severe
  #filter(term %in% "Control - Very severe case") %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1)  %>%
  droplevels()
  
enrichment_tests <- sig_genes %>%
  left_join(ko2path, by="geneID") %>%
  filter(path %in% path_list$path) %>%
  filter(!is.na(path)) %>%
  mutate(gene_name = paste(geneID, gene_name)) %>%
  group_by(path, age_group, term) %>%
  summarize(num_sig_genes = n(), 
            genes = paste(gene_name, collapse = ", "), 
            num_pos = sum(estimate>0), 
            num_neg = sum(estimate<0)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(num_genes_in_pathway, by="path") %>%
  filter(num_genes_in_path > 1) %>%
  
  group_by(path, age_group, term) %>%
  mutate(sig_genes_thresh = num_sig_genes > 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(path) %>%
  mutate(max_sig_genes_thresh = any(sig_genes_thresh)) %>%
  filter(max_sig_genes_thresh) %>%
  
  mutate(p.value = 1 - phyper(num_sig_genes, num_genes_in_path, num_gene_universe-num_genes_in_path, nrow(sig_genes))) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  left_join(path_list, by="path") %>%
  mutate(perc_sig = num_sig_genes/num_genes_in_path) %>%
  mutate(path_text = paste0(num_pos, "+;", num_neg, "-"))


enrichment_tests %>%
  filter(fdr<0.05) %>% 
  
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  mutate(rank = rank(perc_sig)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  mutate(age_group = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) sub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  
  mutate(path_name = reorder(path_name, rank)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = perc_sig, y=path_name, fill=num_sig_genes)) +
    geom_bar(stat="identity") +
    geom_text(aes(label=path_text), nudge_x = 0.03, size=3) +
    scale_fill_viridis(trans="log10", option="magma", end=0.8) +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels=scales:::percent) +
    #facet_wrap(~age_group) +
    facet_grid(age_group + term ~., scales="free", space="free") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom", 
      legend.direction = "horizontal"
    ) +
    labs(
      x= "Percent of genes in pathway\nassociated with comparison",
      y="", fill="Number of\ngenes\nq<0.1"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig2H_pathway_enrichments.pdf", height=4, width=9, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r}
summaries_df %>% 
  filter(fdr < 0.1) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("abx", term)) %>% 
  select(gene_name, age_group, term, estimate) %>% 
  mutate(direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "up", "down")) %>% 
  group_by(age_group, term, direction) %>% 
  count()
```

## Fig 2G severe vs very severe

```{r}
props_toTest <- props_toTest_npop %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_toTest$SampleID) %>%
  filter(study_group_collapse %in% "Pneumonia") %>%
  droplevels() 
```


For each age group: props_log ~ study_group


```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  kable_style()
```





For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group


```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Severe - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("current_abxYes", "Abx", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  kable_style()
```




```{r}
taxa_toPlot <- summaries_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("Abx", term)) %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  pull(Taxa) %>%
  as.character()

props_toTest %>%
  
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_toPlot) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacillota ", "", x))) %>%
  
  #group_by(Taxa) %>%
  #mutate(max_prop = max(props) * 3) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(age_groups = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_groups, y=props, color=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    #geom_hline(aes(yintercept=max_prop), color="white") +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75,  aes(shape=current_abx, group=study_group_collapse_control)) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10", limits=c(9e-9, 5)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    #guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="Antibiotics",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig2G_select_taxa.pdf", height=3.5, width=4, useDingbats=F)
```


## SuppFig 3A Sputum samples

```{r}
s_toTest <- s %>%
  filter(Keep) %>%
  filter(!isControl) %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% c("Induced Sputum")) %>%
  filter(study_group_collapse %in% "Case") %>%
  filter(death %in% "No") %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  
  mutate(age_group = factor(age_group, levels=c("0-5 months", "6-11 months", "12-23 months", "24-59 months"))) %>%
  mutate(age_group_linear = factor(age_group, ordered=T))

## Change this to be the breakdown of whatever variable the collaborator is interested in
addmargins(table(s_toTest$current_abx, s_toTest$study_group, useNA = "ifany")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf)

```


```{r}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  pcoaplus(bc) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
pc_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=study_group, shape=current_abx)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse() +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="Antibiotics", fill="")

ggsave("perch_SuppFig3A_pcoa_sputum.pdf", height=2, width=7.5, useDingbats=F)
```


For each age group: distmat ~ current_abx + study_group

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonisplus(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + study_group,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()


# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```


```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  #group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + study_group + age_group,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = age_group, alpha=1)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()


# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```


## SuppFig 3B Sputum diff ab

```{r}
props_toTest <- summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>%
  right_join(s_toTest, by="SampleID")  %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, study_group) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = mean(props > 0)) %>%
  mutate(mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(max_mean_prop = max(mean_prop)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(max_mean_prop > 0.01) %>%
  
  # We only want the species level assignments
  #filter(!Taxa %in% c("Bacteria", "Bacillota Streptococcus", "Pseudomonadota Haemophilus", "Pseudomonadota Klebsiella")) %>% 
  filter(!Taxa %in% c("Bacteria", "Bacillota Streptococcus")) %>% 
  
  mutate(props_original = props) %>%
  mutate(props = props + min(filter(., props>0)$props) / 10) %>%
  mutate(props_log = log10(props))
```


For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group


```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```



```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=2}

summaries_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("current_abx", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=age_group, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_SuppFig3B_diffAb.pdf", height=1.5, width=5.3, useDingbats=F)
```

Age association in the sputum

props_log ~ study_group + age_group_linear

```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ study_group + age_group_linear, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1) %>%
#  column_spec(c(1:2), width = "15em")
```







```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  ## we don't care about the quadratic or cubic terms (None are q<0.1 anyways)
  #filter(term == "age_group_linear.L") %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  arrange(Taxa, term) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_reorder(Taxa, estimate, .fun = `[`, 1)) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  mutate(term = factor(term)) %>%
  mutate(term = fct_recode(term, `Linear term`="age_group_linear.L", `Quadratic term`="age_group_linear.Q")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=term)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error),  position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("gray10", "gray70")) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log increase with age",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_diffAb_withQuadratic_sputum.pdf", height=4.8, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```

## Sputum / NPOP Pairwise analysis

```{r}
s_pairwise <- s_npop %>%
  filter(subject_id %in% s_toTest$subject_id) %>%
  bind_rows(s_toTest)

#table(s_pairwise$sample_type, s_pairwise$subject_id)
```


```{r}
pairwise_dists <- bind_rows(
  as.matrix(bc) %>%
    as_tibble(rownames="SampleID.x") %>%
    pivot_longer(names_to="SampleID.y", values_to="distance", -SampleID.x) %>%
    mutate(metric = "Bray-Curtis"),
  
  as.matrix(jd) %>%
    as_tibble(rownames="SampleID.x") %>%
    pivot_longer(names_to="SampleID.y", values_to="distance", -SampleID.x) %>%
    mutate(metric = "Jaccard")
  ) %>%
  filter(SampleID.x != SampleID.y) %>%
  left_join(select(s_pairwise, SampleID.x=SampleID, subject_id, sample_type, current_abx, study_group_death, age_group), by="SampleID.x") %>%
  left_join(select(s_pairwise, SampleID.y=SampleID, subject_id, sample_type, current_abx), by="SampleID.y") %>%
  filter(subject_id.x == subject_id.y) %>%
  filter(sample_type.x %in% "NPOP VTM") %>%
  filter(sample_type.y %in% "Induced Sputum")  %>%
  select(-subject_id.y) %>%
  rename(ParticipantID=subject_id.x) %>%
  mutate(current_abx = ifelse(current_abx.x %in% "Yes" | current_abx.y %in% "Yes", "Yes", "No"))
```



For each age group: distance ~ current_abx + study_group_death

```{r}
summaries_df <- pairwise_dists %>%
  
  group_by(metric, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(distance ~ current_abx + study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ current_abx + study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Severe - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(metric, term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```


For each age group: distance ~ current_abx + study_group_death

```{r}
summaries_df <- pairwise_dists %>%
  
  group_by(metric, age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(distance ~ current_abx, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ current_abx + study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Severe - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(metric, term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
pairwise_dists %>%
  filter(metric %in% "Bray-Curtis") %>%
  mutate(x = gsub(" ", "\n", study_group_death)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=x, y=distance, shape=current_abx, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_grid(.~age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", shape="Abx", color="",
      y="Bray-Curtis distance between\nNP/OP and sputum samples"
    )
#ggsave("perch_SuppFig2C_pairwise.pdf", height=3.5, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```

## Dirichlet 





```{r eval=F}
library(polyafit)
matrix.please<-function(x) {
    m<-as.matrix(x[,-1])
    rownames(m)<-x[[1]]
    m
}

pfit_results <- counts %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxid") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxid, names_to="SampleID", values_to="counts") %>%
  right_join(select(s_pairwise, SampleID, subject_id, sample_type), by="SampleID")  %>%
  right_join(enframe(a, name = "Taxid", value="Taxa"), by="Taxid") %>%
  select(-Taxid) %>%
  select(-SampleID) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_other(Taxa, keep=unique(props_pairwise$Taxa))) %>%
  #group_by(Taxa, subject_id, sample_type) %>%
  #summarize(counts = sum(counts)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  
  pivot_wider(names_from="sample_type", values_from="counts") %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Induced Sputum`) & !is.na(`NPOP VTM`)) %>%
  
  nest_by(subject_id) %>%
  mutate(model = list(pfit(t(matrix.please(data))))) %>%
  ungroup()
saveRDS(pfit_results, "perch_pfit_results_all.rds")
```


```{r eval=F}
pfit_results_pvalues <- pfit_results %>%
  group_by(subject_id) %>%
  summarize(feature_enrichment(model[[1]])) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #View() #%>%
  #filter(observation == "counts.x") %>%
  #select(-observation) %>%
  mutate(p.value = ifelse(p.value<0, 0, p.value))
write.table(pfit_results_pvalues, file="perch_pfit_results_pvalues.txt", sep='\t', row.names=F, quote=F)

pfit_results_theta <- pfit_results %>%
  group_by(subject_id) %>%
  summarize(theta = model[[1]]$theta) %>%
  ungroup()
write.table(pfit_results_theta, file="perch_pfit_results_theta.txt", sep='\t', row.names=F, quote=F)
```


```{r}
pfit_results_pvalues <- read_delim("perch_pfit_results_pvalues.txt", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename(Taxa=feature, sample_type=observation) %>%
  #filter(sample_type %in% c("Induced Sputum")) %>%
  group_by(sample_type) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
pfit_results_theta <- read_delim("perch_pfit_results_theta.txt", show_col_types = FALSE)
```


```{r}
taxa_of_interest <- pfit_results_pvalues %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% "Induced Sputum") %>%
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death, age_group) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  summarize(nsig = sum(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(-nsig) %>%
  filter(nsig > 5) %>%
  #slice(1:20) %>%
  pull(Taxa)


## Pick the taxa based on what we have showcased
taxa_of_interest2 <- c("Bacillota Streptococcus mitis", "Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae", "Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius", "Bacillota Streptococcus oralis", "Pseudomonadota Moraxella nonliquefaciens")
```


Fisher exact test on age groups

```{r}
## Fisher exact test on age groups
summaries_df <- pfit_results_pvalues %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% "Induced Sputum") %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_of_interest) %>%
```
