```{r}
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death, age_group) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  summarize(nsig = sum(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(s_npop %>% filter(subject_id %in% unique(pfit_results_pvalues$subject_id)) %>% count(age_group, name = "total"), by="age_group") %>%
  mutate(not_sig = total - nsig) %>%
  #pivot_longer(cols=c("nsig", "not_sig"))
  
  nest_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(model = list(fisher.test(as.matrix(data %>% select(nsig, not_sig))))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  summarize(tidy(model[[1]])) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Taxa, p.value) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH"))

summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  kable_style()
```

Fisher exact test on severe vs very severe

```{r}
## Fisher exact test on severe vs very severe
summaries_df <- pfit_results_pvalues %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% "Induced Sputum") %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_of_interest) %>%
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death, age_group) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(Taxa, study_group_death) %>%
  summarize(nsig = sum(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(s_npop %>% filter(subject_id %in% unique(pfit_results_pvalues$subject_id)) %>% count(study_group_death, name = "total"), by="study_group_death") %>%
  mutate(not_sig = total - nsig) %>%
  #pivot_longer(cols=c("nsig", "not_sig"))
  
  nest_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(model = list(fisher.test(as.matrix(data %>% select(nsig, not_sig))))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  summarize(tidy(model[[1]])) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Taxa, p.value) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH"))


summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)
```


Fisher exact test on taxa enriched in sputum

```{r eval=F}
## Fisher exact test on severe vs very severe
summaries_df <- pfit_results_pvalues %>%
  select(subject_id, sample_type, Taxa, fdr) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from="sample_type", values_from="fdr") %>%
  mutate(enriched_in = case_when(
    `Induced Sputum` < 0.1 ~ "Induced Sputum",
    `NPOP VTM` < 0.1 ~ "NPOP",
    TRUE ~ "None"
  )) %>%
  
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_of_interest) %>%
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death, age_group) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(Taxa, enriched_in) %>%
  summarize(nsig = sum(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(s_npop %>% filter(subject_id %in% unique(pfit_results_pvalues$subject_id)) %>% count(study_group_death, name = "total"), by="study_group_death") %>%
  mutate(not_sig = total - nsig) %>%
  #pivot_longer(cols=c("nsig", "not_sig"))
  
  nest_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(model = list(fisher.test(as.matrix(data %>% select(nsig, not_sig))))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  summarize(tidy(model[[1]])) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Taxa, p.value) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH"))


summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)
```

```{r}
props_dirichlet <- summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>%
  
  mutate(props = props + min(filter(., props>0)$props) / 5) %>%
  
  right_join(select(filter(s, subject_id %in% pfit_results_theta$subject_id), SampleID, subject_id, sample_type, study_group, age_group), by="SampleID")  %>%
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  select(-SampleID) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from="sample_type", values_from="props") %>%
  
  left_join(pfit_results_pvalues %>% group_by(subject_id, Taxa) %>% summarize(fdr = min(fdr)) %>% ungroup() , by=c("subject_id", "Taxa")) %>%
  droplevels() 
```



```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
props_dirichlet %>%
  filter(!is.na(fdr)) %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_of_interest2) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr<0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  #mutate(Taxa = gsub(" ", "\n", Taxa)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=`NPOP VTM`, y=`Induced Sputum`, color=study_group_death, shape=isSig, alpha=isSig)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype=2) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10", labels=scales:::percent) +
    scale_x_continuous(trans="log10", labels=scales:::percent) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(19,16)) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(1, 0.3)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=6) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1
    ) +
    labs(
      color="", shape="", alpha=""
    )

#ggsave("perch_Fig2I_dirichlet.pdf", height=2.5, width=12, useDingbats=F)
```






# Supplemental Figure 4: Malnutrition

## SuppFig 4A

```{r}
s_toTest <- s_npop %>%
  filter(death == "No") %>%
  droplevels()
```

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
p2 <- predict(rf_model, testing_data)

predict_df <- enframe(p2, name = "SampleID", value="MMI") %>%
  left_join(select(s_toTest, SampleID, actual_age=age_months, study_group, study_group_collapse, study_group_collapse_control, age_group, malnutrition_baseline, malnutrition_baseline_all, current_abx), by="SampleID") %>%
  bind_rows(training_df)

mod2 = nls(MMI ~ SSlogis(actual_age, Asym, xmid, scal), data=predict_df %>% filter(study_group_collapse %in% "Pneumonia"))

predict_df %>%
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x=actual_age, y=MMI, color=interaction(malnutrition_baseline, study_group_collapse, sep = " "))) +
  geom_point() +
  #annotate(geom="text", x=0, y=40, label=paste("Logistic curve for pneumonia:\nHoriz. asymptote=", round(mod2$m$getPars()['Asym'],2), "\nxmid=", round(mod2$m$getPars()['xmid'],2), "\nscale=", round(mod2$m$getPars()['scal'],2)), hjust = 0) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "nls", formula = y ~ SSlogis(x, Asym, xmid, scal),
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(
    #legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(
    y = "Predicted age",
    x = "Actual age", color=""
    #title = "Predicted age from microbiome abundances",
    #subtitle = "Curves represents self-starting logistic model"
  )
ggsave("perch_SuppFig4A_maturation_index.pdf", height=3, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```

## SuppFig 4B

```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=3}

# mod1 is the SSlogis model for Controls
# mod2 is the SSlogis model for Pneumonia

predict_df$curve_value <- predict(mod1, newdata = predict_df)

predict_df <- predict_df %>%
  mutate(RMMI = MMI - curve_value)

#plot_df_25taxa <- plot_df
```

```{r}
predict_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = interaction(malnutrition_baseline, study_group_collapse, sep = '\n'), y = RMMI, color=actual_age)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0) +
    geom_quasirandom(aes(shape=current_abx)) +
    #scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-26.5, 30)) +
    scale_color_viridis() +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      x="", color="Actual\nage", shape="Antibiotics"
    )
ggsave("perch_SuppFig4B_maturation_index.pdf", height=2.8, width=5, useDingbats=F)
```

RMMI ~ current_abx + malnutrition_baseline + study_group_collapse

```{r}
tidy(lm(RMMI ~ current_abx + malnutrition_baseline + study_group_collapse, data = predict_df))
```


For each study group: RMMI ~ current_abx + malnutrition_baseline
```{r}
predict_df %>%
  group_by(study_group_collapse) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(RMMI ~ current_abx + malnutrition_baseline, data = .))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("malnutrition_baseline", "Normal - ", term)) %>%
  kable_style()
```


RMMI ~ current_abx + malnutrition_baseline_all + study_group_collapse

```{r}
tidy(lm(RMMI ~ current_abx + malnutrition_baseline_all + study_group_collapse, data = predict_df))
```

## SuppFig 4B Differential abundance



```{r}
props_toTest <- props_toTest_npop %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_toTest$SampleID) %>%
  droplevels() 
```


For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse + malnutrition_baseline



```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse + malnutrition_baseline, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("current_abxYes", "Abx", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("malnutrition_baseline", "Normal weight - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "p<0.05", "p>0.05")) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", isSig)) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=age_group, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    facet_wrap(~term, ncol=6) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(8,1,16)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_malnutrition_diff_ab2.pdf", height=6, width=1, useDingbats=F)
```

For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse + malnutrition_baseline

The same test as above but for just the breastfeeding associated bacteria

```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  # only test for the bacteria assocaited with breastfeeding
  filter(Taxa %in% c("Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius", "Bacillota Streptococcus parasanguinis", "Bacillota Streptococcus thermophilus", "Bacillota Streptococcus vestibularis")) %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_collapse + malnutrition_baseline, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("current_abxYes", "Abx", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("malnutrition_baseline", "Normal weight - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  
  #group_by(Taxa) %>%
  #mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  #filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "p<0.05", "p>0.05")) %>%
  #mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", isSig)) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=age_group, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    facet_wrap(~term) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
```


```{r}
props_toTest %>%
  mutate(x = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  # only test for the bacteria assocaited with breastfeeding
  filter(Taxa %in% c("Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius", "Bacillota Streptococcus parasanguinis", "Bacillota Streptococcus thermophilus", "Bacillota Streptococcus vestibularis")) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = sub("Bacillota ", "", Taxa)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=x, y = props, color=age_group, shape=malnutrition_baseline)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10", labels=scales:::percent, limits=c(9e-9, 3)) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position="bottom"
    ) +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_SuppFig4C_bf_bacteria.pdf", height=3, width=8.7, useDingbats=F)
```

For each age group and study group: props_log ~ bf_current + study_group + malnutrition_baseline

Not corrected for abx

```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, age_group, study_group_collapse) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~  bf_current + study_group + malnutrition_baseline, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("malnutrition_baseline", "Normal weight - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group, study_group_collapse) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "p<0.05", "p>0.05")) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", isSig)) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=age_group, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    facet_wrap(~term + study_group_collapse, ncol=6) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(8,1,16)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_malnutrition_diff_ab2.pdf", height=6, width=1, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r}
s_toTest %>%
  filter(age_group %in% "12-23 months") %>%
  count(bf_current, malnutrition_baseline, study_group_collapse) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)
```



# Figure 3: Childhood mortality

```{r}
s_toTest <- s_npop #%>%
  #filter(study_group_death %in% c("Very severe case", "Death")) %>%
  #droplevels()
```



## qPCR results 

```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=20}
qpcr <- read_delim("Data/perch_qpcr_all.txt") %>%
  right_join(select(s_npop, ParticipantID, study_group_collapse_control, study_group_death, age_group), by="ParticipantID") %>%
  mutate(test_group = ifelse(grepl("Ct value", bugs), "CT", "Copy number")) %>%
  mutate(ct = ifelse(test_group%in% "CT" & ct==0, 40, ct))
```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
qpcr %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relabel(study_group_death, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(bugs = str_wrap(bugs, width=20))  %>%
  filter(test_group %in% "CT") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=ct, color=age_group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    facet_wrap(~bugs, scales = "free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      x="",
      y="CT"
    )
ggsave("perch_qpcr_CT.pdf", height=15, width=15, useDingbats=F)

```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}

qpcr %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relabel(study_group_death, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(bugs = str_wrap(bugs, width=20))  %>%
  filter(test_group %in% "Copy number") %>%
  mutate(ct = ifelse(ct==0, 1, ct)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=ct, color=age_group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    facet_wrap(~bugs, scales = "free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      x="",
      y="Copy number"
    )
ggsave("perch_qpcr_copy_number.pdf", height=15, width=15, useDingbats=F)
```

```{r eval=F}
s_toTest %>%
  left_join(props_toTest %>% 
              #filter(Taxa %in% "Pseudomonadota Enterobacteriaceae") %>% 
              filter(Taxa %in% "Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae") %>% 
              select(SampleID, Taxa, props),
            by="SampleID") %>%
  do(tidy(lm(props ~ study_group_death * Shannon, data=.))) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)



s_toTest %>%
  left_join(props_toTest %>% 
              #filter(Taxa %in% "Pseudomonadota Enterobacteriaceae") %>% 
              filter(Taxa %in% "Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae") %>% 
              select(SampleID, Taxa, props),
            by="SampleID") %>%
  group_by(study_group_death) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(props ~ age_group + Shannon, data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)
```


## Fig 3A Alpha diversity


```{r fig.width=8}
s_toTest %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Shannon, fill=study_group_death)) +
    geom_density(alpha=0.9) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    #scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1.25) +
    guides(alpha="none") +
    labs(
      y="", fill="",
      x="Shannon diversity"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig3A_alpha.pdf", height=3.3, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


For each age group: alpha ~ current_abx + study_group_death with the subjects who died as the reference

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relevel(study_group_death, "Death", after=0)) %>%
  
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(Shannon ~ current_abx + study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```





## Fig 3B Dysbiosis score



```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=8}
s_toTest %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=median_dysbiosis, fill=study_group_death)) +
    geom_density(alpha=0.9) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    #scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    #scale_y_continuous(limits=c(.45, 1.05)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1.25
      #axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      #legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    guides(alpha="none") +
    labs(
      y="", fill="",
      x="Dysbiosis score"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig3B_dysbiosis.pdf", height=3.3, width=7.9, useDingbats=F)
```


For each age group: median_dysbiosis ~ current_abx + study_group_death where subjects who died is the reference group

```{r}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relevel(study_group_death, "Death", after=0)) %>%
  
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(median_dysbiosis ~ current_abx + study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term))  %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  kable_style()
```





## Fig 3C Beta diversity

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=8}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  pcoaplus(bc) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
pc_df %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=study_group_death, shape=current_abx)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse(aes(linetype=isDeath)) +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_death)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="Antibiotics", fill="")

ggsave("perch_Fig3C_pcoa_death_by_age.pdf", height=2, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```




For each age group: distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_death

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_death,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = study_group_death, alpha = 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  filter(grepl("Death", comparison))

# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  select(-term)%>%
  kable_style()
```


## Fig 3D KEGG beta diversity

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=8}
pc_df <- s_toTest %>%
  pcoaplus(bc_kegg) 

centroids <- pc_df %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  summarize(Axis.1=mean(Axis.1), Axis.2=mean(Axis.2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
pc_df %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=Axis.1, y=Axis.2, color=study_group_death, shape=current_abx)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse(aes(linetype=isDeath)) +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_death)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() + 
    guides(alpha="none") +
    labs(
      x=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[1],
      y=attr(pc_df, "axislabel")[2],
      color="", shape="Antibiotics", fill="")

ggsave("perch_Fig3D_pcoa_death_by_age.pdf", height=2, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```

For each age group: distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_death

```{r eval=T}
summaries_df <- s_toTest %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = bc_kegg, formula = distmat ~ current_abx + study_group_death,
    sample_id_var = SampleID, permutations=999, which = study_group_death, alpha = 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  filter(grepl("Death", comparison)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  select(-term)%>%
  kable_style()
```






## Fig 3E Differential abundance

```{r}
props_toTest <- props_toTest_npop #%>%
  #filter(study_group_death %in% c("Very severe case", "Death")) %>%
  #droplevels()
```


For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_death where subjects who died is the reference group in the comparisons.


```{r}
summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relevel(study_group_death, "Death", after=0)) %>%
  group_by(Taxa, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_collapse", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("current_abxYes", "Abx", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
```



```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=4, eval=F}

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_reorder(Taxa, estimate, .fun = `[`, 4)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  mutate(term = tolower(term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Compared to ", term)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=age_group, shape=isSig, alpha=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(1, 0.4)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_wrap(~term, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape="", alpha="",
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig3E_diffAb.pdf", height=5, width=4.2, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

summaries_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("Abx", term)) %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_reorder(Taxa, estimate, .fun = `[`, 12)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  #mutate(term = tolower(term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "", term)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=Taxa, color=term, shape=isSig, alpha=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(1, 0.4)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape="", alpha="",
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig3E_diffAb.pdf", height=5, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


## Fig 4F Focus on differential abundance

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
taxa_toPlot <- summaries_df %>%
  filter(estimate<0) %>%
  filter(fdr<0.1) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  mutate(nums = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(nums>1) %>%
  pull(Taxa) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()

taxa_toPlot <- c("Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae", "Pseudomonadota Enterobacteriaceae", "Bacillota Staphylococcus epidermidis", "Bacillota Limosilactobacillus fermentum")

props_toTest %>%
  
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_toPlot) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacillota ", "", x))) %>%
  
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(age_groups = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=props, fill=study_group_death, alpha=isDeath)) +
    geom_density() +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_grid(Taxa~age_group, scales="free") +
    #scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10") +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y=element_text(angle=0),
      axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      aspect.ratio = 1
    ) +
    guides(alpha="none") +
    labs(
      x="", fill="", shape="",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig3F_select_taxa.pdf", height=5.5, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```




## Most abundant taxon analysis

```{r}
s_toTest %>%
  mutate(topTaxa_coded = fct_lump(topGenus, prop=0.007)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, fill=topTaxa_coded)) +
    geom_bar() +
    facet_wrap(~age_group) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette="Paired") +
    theme_clean()
```


```{r}
s_toTest %>%
  mutate(topTaxa_coded = fct_lump(topGenus, prop=0.007)) %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death, topTaxa_coded) %>%
  summarize(count = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  mutate(percentage = count / total) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=percentage, fill=topTaxa_coded)) +
    geom_bar(stat="identity") +
    facet_wrap(~age_group) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette="Paired") +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      y="Percentage of samples",
      fill="Dominant\ntaxon"
    )
```




## Fig 3G VfDB

```{r}
genes_toTest <- vfdb %>%
  #filter(geneID %in% h_flu_vfdb) %>%
  
  right_join(s_toTest, by="SampleID") %>%
  
  group_by(geneID) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = mean(props > 0)) %>%
  mutate(mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  #summarize(perc_present = mean(props > 0), mean_prop = mean(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(perc_present > 0.5) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  
  mutate(props_original = props) %>%
  mutate(props = props + min(filter(., props>0)$props) / 10) %>%
  mutate(props_log = log10(props))
```

For each age group: props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_death

```{r}
summaries_df <- genes_toTest %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relevel(study_group_death, "Death", after=0)) %>%
  group_by(geneID, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ current_abx + study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group_death, data=.), "study_group_death")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("current_abxYes", "Abx", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1) %>%
#  column_spec(c(1,3), width = "13em")
```


```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=8}
hflu <- summaries_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("Abx", term)) %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  group_by(geneID) %>%
  summarize(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1 & estimate>0)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  pull(geneID)


genes_of_interest <- summaries_df %>%
  filter(term %in% "study_group_deathSevere case") %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  arrange(-estimate) %>%
  slice(1:20) %>%
  pull(geneID)

summaries_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("Abx", term)) %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  
  #group_by(geneID) %>%
  #mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.01 & estimate>0.5)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  #filter(num_sig) %>%
  filter(geneID %in% genes_of_interest) %>%
  
  mutate(geneID = fct_reorder(geneID, estimate, .fun = `[`, 11)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "", term)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=geneID, color=term, shape=isSig, alpha=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(1, 0.4)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape="", alpha="",
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig3G_vfdb_main.pdf", height=5, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
hflu <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  group_by(geneID) %>%
  summarize(num_sig = any(fdr<0.01 & estimate>0)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  pull(geneID)

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  group_by(geneID) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.01 & estimate>0)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(geneID = fct_reorder(geneID, estimate, .fun = `[`, 11)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = gsub(" ", "\n", term)) %>%
  
  mutate(significance = p_stars(fdr)) %>%
  mutate(sig_color = ifelse(estimate > 2, "A", "B")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=term, y=geneID, fill=estimate)) +
    geom_tile() +
    geom_text(aes(label=significance, color=sig_color), size=2.5) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(high = "#B4654A", mid="#E8E8E8", low="#3A506B") + 
    scale_color_manual(values=c("gray90", "gray10")) +
    theme_clean() +
    #coord_equal() +
    theme(
      #aspect.ratio=1
    ) +
    guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", y="",
      fill="Mean\nlog\ndifference"
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig4G_vfdb_main2.pdf", height=5, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
genes_toTest %>%
  
  filter(geneID %in% c("hemR", "hxuA", "hxuB", "hxuC")) %>%
  
  mutate(age_groups = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_groups, y=props, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75, aes(shape=current_abx, group=study_group_death)) +
    facet_wrap(~geneID, ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10", limits=c(4e-9, 0.008)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      aspect.ratio = 0.75
    ) +
    #guides(color="none") +
    labs(
      x="", color="", shape="Antibiotics",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig3H_vfdb.pdf", height=5, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
genes_toTest %>%
  
  filter(geneID %in% c("hemR", "hxuA", "hxuB", "hxuC")) %>%
  
  mutate(age_groups = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=props, fill=study_group_death, alpha=isDeath)) +
    geom_density() +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_grid(geneID~age_group, scales="free") +
    #scale_shape_manual(values=c(17,2)) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels=scales:::percent, trans="log10") +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y=element_text(angle=0),
      axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      aspect.ratio = 1
    ) +
    guides(alpha="none") +
    labs(
      x="", fill="", shape="",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4H_vfdb2.pdf", height=5.5, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```




## Dirichlet

```{r eval=F}

pfit_results2 <- counts %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxid") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxid, names_to="SampleID", values_to="counts") %>%
  right_join(select(filter(s, death %in% "Yes"), SampleID, subject_id, sample_type), by="SampleID")  %>%
  right_join(enframe(a, name = "Taxid", value="Taxa"), by="Taxid") %>%
  select(-Taxid) %>%
  select(-SampleID) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_other(Taxa, keep=unique(props_pairwise$Taxa))) %>%
  #group_by(Taxa, subject_id, sample_type) %>%
  #summarize(counts = sum(counts)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  
  pivot_wider(names_from="sample_type", values_from="counts") %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Induced Sputum`) & !is.na(`NPOP VTM`)) %>%
  
  nest_by(subject_id) %>%
  mutate(model = list(pfit(t(matrix.please(data))))) %>%
  ungroup()
saveRDS(pfit_results2, "perch_pfit_results_death.rds")
```


```{r eval=F}
pfit_results_pvalues <- pfit_results2 %>%
  group_by(subject_id) %>%
  summarize(feature_enrichment(model[[1]])) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #View() #%>%
  #filter(observation == "counts.x") %>%
  #select(-observation) %>%
  mutate(p.value = ifelse(p.value<0, 0, p.value))
write.table(pfit_results_pvalues, file="perch_pfit_results_pvalues_death.txt", sep='\t', row.names=F, quote=F)

pfit_results_theta <- pfit_results2 %>%
  group_by(subject_id) %>%
  summarize(theta = model[[1]]$theta) %>%
  ungroup()
write.table(pfit_results_theta, file="perch_pfit_results_theta_death.txt", sep='\t', row.names=F, quote=F)
```



```{r}
pfit_results_pvalues <- bind_rows(
  read_delim("perch_pfit_results_pvalues.txt", show_col_types = FALSE),
  read_delim("perch_pfit_results_pvalues_death.txt", show_col_types = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  rename(Taxa=feature, sample_type=observation) %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% c("Induced Sputum")) %>%
  #group_by(sample_type) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) #%>%
  #ungroup()
```

```{r}
pfit_results_theta <-bind_rows(
  read_delim("perch_pfit_results_theta.txt", show_col_types = FALSE),
  read_delim("perch_pfit_results_theta_death.txt", show_col_types = FALSE)
)
```

```{r}
taxa_of_interest <- pfit_results_pvalues %>%
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death, age_group) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>%
  summarize(nsig = sum(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(-nsig) %>%
  slice(1:20) %>%
  pull(Taxa)
```


```{r eval=F}
pfit_results_pvalues %>%
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death, age_group) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(Taxa,study_group_death) %>%
  summarize(nsig = sum(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(-nsig) %>%
  #slice(1:20) %>%
  #pull(Taxa)
  View()
```


```{r}
props_dirichlet <- summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>%
  
  mutate(props = props + min(filter(., props>0)$props) / 5) %>%
  
  right_join(select(filter(s, subject_id %in% pfit_results_theta$subject_id), SampleID, subject_id, sample_type, study_group, age_group), by="SampleID")  %>%
  left_join(select(s_npop, subject_id, study_group_death) %>% unique(), by="subject_id") %>%
  select(-SampleID) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from="sample_type", values_from="props") %>%
  
  left_join(select(pfit_results_pvalues, -sample_type), by=c("subject_id", "Taxa")) %>%
  droplevels() #%>%
  
  #mutate(props_original = props) %>%
  
  #mutate(props_log = log10(props))

```


```{r}
props_dirichlet %>%
  filter(subject_id %in% c("p_m00001", "p_m00007", "p_m00032", "p_m00033", "p_m00039", 
"p_m00029", "p_m00049", "p_m00059", "p_m00129", "p_m00223", "p_m00046", 
"p_m00123", "p_m00136", "p_m00170", "p_m00266", "p_m00094", "p_m00159", 
"p_m00187", "p_m00351", "p_m00464")) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr<0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = gsub(" ", "\n", Taxa)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=`NPOP VTM`, y=`Induced Sputum`, color=study_group_death, shape=isSig, alpha=isSig)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype=2) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") +
    scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(8,16)) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(1, 0.4)) +
    facet_wrap(~subject_id) +
    theme_clean()
```




```{r fig.width=15, fig.height=15}
props_dirichlet %>%
  filter(!is.na(fdr)) %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% taxa_of_interest) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr<0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = gsub(" ", "\n", Taxa)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=`NPOP VTM`, y=`Induced Sputum`, color=age_group, shape=isSig, alpha=isSig)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype=2) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10", labels=scales:::percent) +
    scale_x_continuous(trans="log10", labels=scales:::percent) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(8,16)) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(1, 0.3)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1
    ) +
    labs(
      color="", shape="", alpha=""
    )

ggsave("perch_dirichlet_top20_sputum_enriched_age.pdf", height=12, width=12, useDingbats=F)
```


# Figure 4: Antibody

```{r}
s_toTest <- s_npop
```


```{r}
## sanity checks
checks <- antibody %>%
  select(Sample, subject_id, age_group, study_group) %>%
  unique() %>%
  full_join(unique(select(s, subject_id, age_group, study_group, death)), by="subject_id") %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = ifelse(death %in% "Yes", "Death", study_group.y)) %>%
  mutate(age_check = age_group.x == age_group.y) %>%
  mutate(group_check = study_group_death == study_group.x)

## 4 samples have mismatched age information. We don't know if these are correctly annotated. Will remove for now.
samples_to_remove <- checks %>%
  filter(!age_check) %>%
  pull(Sample)

antibody_toTest <- antibody %>%
  filter(!Sample %in% samples_to_remove) %>%
  select(subject_id, antibody, panel, value, antibody_category) %>%
  right_join(s_toTest, by="subject_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(antibody)) %>%
  mutate(value_orj = value) %>%
  mutate(value = ifelse(value==0, 0.1, value)) %>%
  mutate(value_log = log10(value))
  
```


```{r fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
antibody_toTest %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=value)) +
    geom_histogram() +
    facet_wrap(~antibody)
```



## Fig 4A: Antibody data overview

```{r fig.height=10}
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% c("panel1", "panel2")) %>%
  filter(!(antibody_category %in% "global" & panel %in% c("panel2", "auto-antigen"))) %>% #keep the panel1 global antibodies
  #filter(age_group != "0-5 months") %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = factor(antibody_category)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "RSV", after=0)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "global", after=0)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=SampleID, y=antibody, fill=value)) +
    geom_tile() +
    #scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
    facet_grid(antibody_category~study_group_death, scales="free", space="free") +
    scale_fill_viridis(option="magma") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm")
    ) +
    labs(
      x="", y=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4A_antibody_overview.pdf", height=8, width=8.6, useDingbats=F)
```

```{r fig.height=15}
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% c("auto-antigen")) %>%
  filter(!antibody_category %in% "global") %>%
  #filter(!(antibody_category %in% "global" & panel %in% c("panel2", "auto-antigen"))) %>% #keep the panel1 global antibodies
  #filter(age_group != "0-5 months") %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(value = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  mutate(antibody_category = factor(antibody_category)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "global", after=0)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=SampleID, y=antibody, fill=value)) +
    geom_tile() +
    #scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
    facet_grid(antibody_category~age_group + study_group_death, scales="free", space="free") +
    scale_fill_viridis(option="magma") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm")
    ) +
    labs(
      x="", y="", fill="Z-score"
    )
ggsave("perch_autoantigen_overview.pdf", height=8, width=25, useDingbats=F)
```



```{r fig.height=10}
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% c("panel1", "panel2")) %>%
  filter(!(antibody_category %in% "global" & panel %in% "panel2")) %>% #keep the panel1 global antibodies
  #filter(age_group != "0-5 months") %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = factor(antibody_category)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "RSV", after=0)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "global", after=0)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relabel(antibody_category, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_recode(antibody_category, Global="global")) %>%
  mutate(age_group = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = fct_relabel(antibody, function(x) sub("Pertactin autotransporter protein", "PRN", x))) %>%
  mutate(antibody = fct_relabel(antibody, function(x) sub("\\(PHUCKET\\)", "", x))) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, study_group_death, age_group) %>%
  mutate(value = mean(value, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = sub("pertusis", "pertussis", antibody)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = factor(antibody_category)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "Bacteria", after=Inf)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=antibody, fill=value)) +
    geom_tile() +
    #scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
    facet_grid(antibody_category~age_group, scales="free", space="free") +
    scale_fill_viridis(option="magma") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.key.width = unit(1.1, "cm"),
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="", y="", fill=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4A_antibody_overview2.pdf", height=8, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```



```{r fig.height=15}
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% "auto-antigen") %>%
  filter(!antibody_category %in% "global") %>%
  filter(!antibody %in% "BPI") %>%
  filter(!(antibody_category %in% "global" & panel %in% "panel2")) %>% #keep the panel1 global antibodies
  #filter(age_group != "0-5 months") %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = factor(antibody_category)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "global", after=0)) %>%
  #mutate(study_group_death = fct_relabel(study_group_death, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(value = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, study_group_death, age_group) %>%
  mutate(value = mean(value, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = sub("pertusis", "pertussis", antibody)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = factor(antibody_category)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "Bacteria", after=Inf)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=antibody, fill=value)) +
    geom_tile() +
    #scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
    facet_grid(antibody_category~age_group, scales="free", space="free") +
    scale_fill_viridis(option="magma") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      #axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      #axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.key.width = unit(0.8, "cm")
    ) +
    labs(
      x="", y="", fill="Mean Z-score"
    )
ggsave("perch_autoantigen_overview2.pdf", height=8, width=5.8, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r}
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% c("panel1", "panel2")) %>%
  filter(antibody %in% c("Anti-human IgG Fc fragment specific", "Anti-human IgG F (ab') fragment specific", "Anti-human IgG (H+L)", "Human IgG from serum")) %>%
  select(SampleID, subject_id, antibody, panel, age_group, study_group_death, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from="panel", values_from="value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=panel1, y=panel2)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype=2) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody) +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_clean()
ggsave("perch_wholeIgg_correlation.pdf", height=4, width=6, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r fig.width=6}


antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(antibody %in% "H. influenzae") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=value, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      x="", color="",
      y="H. influenza antibody levels"
    )
```


```{r fig.width=15}
# averages in healthy over time
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(study_group_collapse %in% "Control") %>%
  
  mutate(category = ifelse(antibody %in% c("Anti-human IgG Fc fragment specific", "Anti-human IgG F (ab') fragment specific", "Anti-human IgG (H+L)", "Human IgG from serum"), "totals", "individual")) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, panel, category, age_group) %>%
  summarize(mean_val = mean(value), sd_val = sd(value)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=mean_val, group=antibody,color=category)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    facet_wrap(~panel) +
    theme_clean()
```




```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=20}
## box and whisker plots
antibody_auto %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=value, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody, scales = "free_y")
ggsave("perch_auto_antibody_boxplot.pdf", height=20, width=20, useDingbats=F)
```


```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
## box and whisker plots
antibody_auto %>%
  filter(age_group %in% "24-59 months") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=value, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody, scales = "free_y")
ggsave("perch_auto_antibody_boxplot_gt2_only.pdf", height=20, width=20, useDingbats=F)
```




## Fig 4B: PCA plot

PCA plot of antibody profiles


### Against bugs

```{r}
antibody_bugs <- antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% c("panel1", "panel2")) %>%
  filter(!(antibody_category %in% "global" & panel %in% "panel2")) %>%
  droplevels()

s_antibody <- antibody_bugs %>%
  select(subject_id, age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  unique()
```


PCA plot after scaling the values

```{r}
antibody_matrix <- antibody_bugs %>%
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(value = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  usedist::pivot_to_numeric_matrix(antibody, subject_id, value)


pca <- prcomp(t(antibody_matrix))
pc_pct <- round((pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100)


centroids <- data_frame(PC1=pca$x[,1], PC2=pca$x[,2], subject_id = rownames(pca$x)) %>%
  left_join(s_antibody, by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  summarize(PC1=mean(PC1), PC2=mean(PC2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  

s_antibody %>%
  merge(pca$x[,1:2], by.x="subject_id", by.y="row.names") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse(aes(linetype=isDeath)) +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_death)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() +
    labs(
      color="", shape="", fill="",
      x=paste0("PCA axis 1 (", pc_pct[1], "%)"),
      y=paste0("PCA axis 2 (", pc_pct[2], "%)")
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig4B_PCA_pathogen_antigen.pdf", height=2, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```




```{r}

antibody_matrix <- antibody_bugs %>%
  usedist::pivot_to_numeric_matrix(antibody, subject_id, value)


pca <- prcomp(t(antibody_matrix))
pc_pct <- round((pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100)


centroids <- data_frame(PC1=pca$x[,1], PC2=pca$x[,2], subject_id = rownames(pca$x)) %>%
  left_join(s_antibody, by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  summarize(PC1=mean(PC1), PC2=mean(PC2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  

s_antibody %>%
  merge(pca$x[,1:2], by.x="subject_id", by.y="row.names") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse(aes(linetype=isDeath)) +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_death)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() +
    labs(
      color="", shape="", fill="",
      x=paste0("PCA axis 1 (", pc_pct[1], "%)"),
      y=paste0("PCA axis 2 (", pc_pct[2], "%)")
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4B_PCA_pathogen_antigen.pdf", height=2, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```




For each age group: distmat ~ study_group_death

```{r eval=T}
euc_bugs <- vegdist(t(antibody_matrix), method="euclidean", binary=F)

summaries_df <- s_antibody %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = euc_bugs, formula = distmat ~ study_group_death,
    sample_id_var = subject_id, permutations=999, which = study_group_death, alpha = 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  filter(grepl("Death", comparison)) %>%
  
  

# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  select(-term)%>%
  kable_style()
```




### Auto-antibodies

```{r}
antibody_auto <- antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% c("auto-antigen")) %>%
  droplevels()

s_antibody <- antibody_auto %>%
  select(subject_id, age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  unique()
```



```{r}
antibody_matrix <- antibody_auto %>%
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(value = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  usedist::pivot_to_numeric_matrix(antibody, subject_id, value)

pca <- prcomp(t(antibody_matrix))
pc_pct <- round((pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100)


centroids <- data_frame(PC1=pca$x[,1], PC2=pca$x[,2], subject_id = rownames(pca$x)) %>%
  left_join(s_antibody, by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  summarize(PC1=mean(PC1), PC2=mean(PC2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  

s_antibody %>%
  merge(pca$x[,1:2], by.x="subject_id", by.y="row.names") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse(aes(linetype=isDeath)) +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_death)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() +
    labs(
      color="", shape="", fill="",
      x=paste0("PCA axis 1 (", pc_pct[1], "%)"),
      y=paste0("PCA axis 2 (", pc_pct[2], "%)")
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig4F_PCA_auto_antigen.pdf", height=2, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```

PCA plot of auto-antibody profiles


```{r}
antibody_matrix <- antibody_auto %>%
  usedist::pivot_to_numeric_matrix(antibody, subject_id, value)

pca <- prcomp(t(antibody_matrix))
pc_pct <- round((pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2) * 100)


centroids <- data_frame(PC1=pca$x[,1], PC2=pca$x[,2], subject_id = rownames(pca$x)) %>%
  left_join(s_antibody, by="subject_id") %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death, isDeath) %>%
  summarize(PC1=mean(PC1), PC2=mean(PC2)) %>%
  ungroup()
  

s_antibody %>%
  merge(pca$x[,1:2], by.x="subject_id", by.y="row.names") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    #stat_ellipse(aes(linetype=isDeath)) +
    geom_point(data=centroids, shape=21, stroke=1, size=2.5, color="black", aes(fill=study_group_death)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,10)) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean_pcoa() +
    labs(
      color="", shape="", fill="",
      x=paste0("PCA axis 1 (", pc_pct[1], "%)"),
      y=paste0("PCA axis 2 (", pc_pct[2], "%)")
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4F_PCA_auto_antigen.pdf", height=2, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```





For each age group: distmat ~ study_group_death

```{r eval=T}
euc_auto <- vegdist(t(antibody_matrix), method="euclidean", binary=F)

summaries_df <- s_antibody %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  do(adonispost(
    ., distmat = euc_auto, formula = distmat ~ study_group_death,
    sample_id_var = subject_id, permutations=999, which = study_group_death, alpha = 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) %>%
  select(-one_of(c("sumsq"))) %>%
  filter(grepl("Death", comparison)) 
  
  

# If you don't need the shuffling functionality, you can use
# summaries_df <- adonisplus(s_toTest, wu, distmat ~ study_group)
# If you would like to test pairs of groups, use adonispost

summaries_df %>%
  select(-term)%>%
  kable_style()
```

## Fig 4E: Total IgG data

This is using the IgG data from panel 1.

```{r fig.width=8}


antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% "panel1") %>%
  filter(antibody %in% c("Human IgG from serum")) %>%
  mutate(age_group = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) sub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(antibody = sub("human ", "human\n", antibody)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=value, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75, size=0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10", limits=c(700, 80000), breaks=c(1000, 3000, 10000, 30000, 100000), labels=c("1000", "3000", "10000", "30000", "100000")) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position="bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="", color="",
      y="Antibody levels"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4E_total_igg.pdf", height=3, width=3.5, useDingbats=F)
```


value_log ~ study_group_death

```{r fig.width=8}


summaries_df <- antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% "panel1") %>%
  filter(antibody %in% c("Human IgG from serum")) %>%
  #mutate(age_group = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) sub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  #mutate(antibody = sub("human ", "human\n", antibody)) %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody, panel) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(value ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(value_log ~ study_group_death, data=.), "study_group_death")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
  
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=3}

summaries_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%
  #mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("Death - ", "Compared to\n", term)) %>%
  
  #group_by(antibody) %>%
  #mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  #filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  #mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, -estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "p<0.05", "p>0.05")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    #scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_grid(.~age_group, space="free", scales="free") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_global_antibody_diffab.pdf", height=5, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```



This is using the IgG data for the auto-antigen



```{r fig.width=8}


antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% "auto-antigen") %>%
  filter(antibody %in% c("Human IgG from serum")) %>%
  mutate(age_group = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) sub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(antibody = sub("human ", "human\n", antibody)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=value, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75, size=0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10", limits=c(700, 80000), breaks=c(1000, 3000, 10000, 30000, 100000), labels=c("1000", "3000", "10000", "30000", "100000")) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position="bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="", color="",
      y="Antibody levels"
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig4E_total_igg.pdf", height=3, width=3.5, useDingbats=F)
```


value_log ~ study_group_death

```{r fig.width=8}


summaries_df <- antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(panel %in% "auto-antigen") %>%
  filter(antibody %in% c("Human IgG from serum")) %>%
  #mutate(age_group = fct_relabel(age_group, function(x) sub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  #mutate(antibody = sub("human ", "human\n", antibody)) %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody, panel) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(value ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(value_log ~ study_group_death, data=.), "study_group_death")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
  
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=3}

summaries_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%
  #mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("Death - ", "Compared to\n", term)) %>%
  
  #group_by(antibody) %>%
  #mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  #filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  #mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, -estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "p<0.05", "p>0.05")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    #scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_grid(.~age_group, space="free", scales="free") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_global_antibody_diffab.pdf", height=5, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```

## Age difference in antibodies

### Against bugs

value_log ~ age_group

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_bugs %>%
  filter(study_group_collapse %in% "Control") %>%
  #filter(panel %in% c("panel1", "panel2")) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, panel) %>%
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(value ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(value_log ~ age_group, data=.), "age_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  select(-statistic) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=7}

summaries_df %>%
  
  filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%

  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  droplevels() %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Dark2") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_wrap(~panel, scales="free") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
```

### Auto-antibodies


## Fig 4C: Diff ab

### Against bugs

For each age group: value ~ study_group_death

All the tests are done with the "death" group as the reference

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_bugs %>%
  #filter(age_group != "0-5 months") %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relevel(study_group_death, "Death", after=0)) %>%
  
  filter(antibody_category != "global") %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody, antibody_category, panel) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(value_log ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  select(-statistic) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=7}

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("Death - ", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, -estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  
  mutate(antibody_category = factor(antibody_category)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "RSV", after=0)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "global", after=0)) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relevel(antibody_category, "Bacteria", after=Inf)) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_relabel(antibody_category, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_recode(antibody_category, Total="global")) %>%
  #mutate(antibody_category = fct_rev(antibody_category)) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = fct_relabel(antibody, function(x) sub("Pertactin autotransporter protein", "PRN", x))) %>%
  mutate(antibody = fct_relabel(antibody, function(x) sub("\\(PHUCKET\\)", "", x))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    #scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    facet_grid(antibody_category~age_group, space="free", scales="free") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4C_antibody_diffab.pdf", height=5.2, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


Now we are excluding the subjects who died.

For each age group: value_log ~ study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_bugs %>%
  
  filter(!study_group_death %in% "Death") %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody, panel) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(value ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(value_log ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  select(-statistic) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=3}

summaries_df %>%
  
  filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%
  #filter(grepl("Control", term)) %>%
  #droplevels() %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig4D_diffAb_2.pdf", height=2.5, width=6.5, useDingbats=F)
```

### Auto-antibodies

For each age group: value_log ~ study_group_death

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_auto %>%
  #filter(age_group != "0-5 months") %>%
  #filter(panel %in% c("auto-antigen")) %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relevel(study_group_death, "Death", after=0)) %>%
  
  filter(antibody_category != "global") %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody, antibody_category, panel) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(value_log ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  select(-statistic) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=7}

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("Death - ", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, -estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody_category = fct_rev(antibody_category)) %>%
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    #scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    facet_grid(antibody_category~age_group, space="free", scales="free") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )

```

Now we are excluding the subjects who died:

For each age group: value_log ~ study_group_collapse_control

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_auto %>%
  #filter(panel %in% c("auto-antigen")) %>%
  filter(!study_group_death %in% "Death") %>%
  group_by(age_group, antibody, panel) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(value ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(value_log ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  select(-statistic) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=7}

summaries_df %>%
  
  filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%
  #filter(grepl("Control", term)) %>%
  #droplevels() %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  #mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) sub("Pseudomonadota |Bacteroidota |Bacillota |Actinomycetota", "", x))) %>%
  
  #mutate(term = sub("Control without RTI - ", "", term))
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig4D_diffAb_2.pdf", height=2.5, width=6.5, useDingbats=F)
```


Do Fisher's exact test instead. We are comparing if each study group is different than the distribution of subjects who died (within each age group)

```{r}
antibody_death <- antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  filter(study_group_death %in% "Death") %>%
  select(subject_id, antibody, age_group, present) %>%
  mutate(test_group = "Death") %>%
  crossing(study_group_death = c("Control", "Severe case", "Very severe case"))
```
