```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  filter(!study_group_death %in% "Death") %>%
  select(subject_id, antibody, antibody_category, study_group_death, age_group, present) %>%
  mutate(test_group = study_group_death) %>%
  
  
  
  bind_rows(antibody_death) %>%
  
  group_by(study_group_death, antibody, age_group) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = sum(present %in% "Present") / n()) %>%
  mutate(Keep = perc_present > 0 & perc_present < 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Keep) %>%
  
  #filter(antibody %in% "IL-17A", age_group %in% "0-5 months") %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  do(tidy(fisher.test(.$test_group, .$present))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()
  

summaries_df %>%
  select(antibody, age_group, study_group_death, estimate, p.value, fdr) %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```


Take the subjects who died out and test between the rest of the groups using Fisher's exact test

```{r}
antibody_death <- antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  filter(study_group_death %in% "Control") %>%
  select(subject_id, antibody, age_group, present) %>%
  mutate(test_group = "Control") %>%
  crossing(study_group_death = c("Severe case", "Very severe case"))

summaries_df <- antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  filter(!study_group_death %in% c("Death", "Control")) %>%
  select(subject_id, antibody, antibody_category, study_group_death, age_group, present) %>%
  mutate(test_group = study_group_death) %>%
  
  bind_rows(antibody_death) %>%
  
  group_by(study_group_death, antibody, age_group) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = sum(present %in% "Present") / n()) %>%
  mutate(Keep = perc_present > 0 & perc_present < 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Keep) %>%
  
  #filter(antibody %in% "IL-17A", age_group %in% "0-5 months") %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  do(tidy(fisher.test(.$test_group, .$present))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  select(antibody, age_group, comparison = study_group_death, p.value) %>%
  mutate(comparison = paste("Control - ", comparison))
  
  
  

summaries_df2 <- antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  filter(study_group_death %in% c("Severe case", "Very severe case")) %>%
  select(subject_id, antibody, antibody_category, study_group_death, age_group, present) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, age_group) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = sum(present %in% "Present") / n()) %>%
  mutate(Keep = perc_present > 0 & perc_present < 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Keep) %>%
  
  #filter(antibody %in% "IL-17A", age_group %in% "0-5 months") %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, age_group) %>%
  do(tidy(fisher.test(.$study_group_death, .$present))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  select(antibody, age_group, p.value) %>%
  mutate(comparison = "Severe - Very severe pneumonia")
  

summaries_df <- bind_rows(summaries_df, summaries_df2) %>%
  group_by(age_group, comparison) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  select(antibody, age_group, study_group_death, estimate, p.value, fdr) %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```




Bar plot of presence/absence of antibodies

```{r fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  
  count(antibody, age_group, study_group_death, present) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=n, color=study_group_death, fill=present)) +
    geom_col(position="dodge") +
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray50", "white")) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody) +
    theme_clean()
```


Same plot but in percentages

```{r fig.width=20, fig.height=20}

antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  
  count(antibody, age_group, study_group_death, present) %>%
  group_by(antibody, age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(perc = n/total)  %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=perc, group=interaction(age_group, study_group_death), color=study_group_death, fill=present)) +
    geom_bar(stat="identity", position = position_stack()) +
    #geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("gray50", "white")) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody) +
    theme_clean()
```



### Fig 4G: age 6-11

```{r}
library(ggpattern)
```

```{r}
toPlot <- summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1) %>%
  filter(age_group %in% "6-11 months") %>%
  pull(antibody) %>%
  unique()
```

```{r}
antibody_auto %>%
  filter(antibody %in% toPlot) %>%
  filter(age_group %in% "6-11 months") %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  
  count(antibody, age_group, study_group_death, present) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=n, fill=study_group_death, alpha=present)) +
    geom_col_pattern(aes(pattern=present), color="black", pattern_density = 0.1) +
    #geom_bar(stat="identity", position = position_stack()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.7, 1)) +
    scale_pattern_manual(values=c("stripe", "none")) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1
    ) +
    labs(
      x= "", color="", fill="Auto-antigen",
      y= "Number of subjects"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4G_auto-antibody_6_11_fishers.pdf", height=2.2, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```


### Fig 4H: age 24-59 months

```{r}
toPlot <- summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1) %>%
  filter(age_group %in% "24-59 months") %>%
  pull(antibody) %>%
  unique()
```

```{r}
antibody_auto %>%
  filter(antibody %in% toPlot) %>%
  filter(age_group %in% "24-59 months") %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  
  count(antibody, age_group, study_group_death, present) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=n, fill=study_group_death, alpha=present)) +
    geom_col_pattern(aes(pattern=present), color="black", pattern_density = 0.1) +
    #geom_bar(stat="identity", position = position_stack()) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.7, 1)) +
    scale_pattern_manual(values=c("stripe", "none")) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody, ncol=7) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      aspect.ratio = 1
    ) +
    labs(
      x= "", color="", fill="Auto-antigen",
      y= "Number of subjects"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4H_auto-antibody_gt2_fishers.pdf", height=2.2, width=22, useDingbats=F)
```

## Correlation with dysbiosis

### Against bugs

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_bugs %>%
  
  group_by(antibody, age_group) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(value_log ~ median_dysbiosis, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(props_log ~ study_group, data=.), "study_group")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(props_log ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "Control - ", term)) %>% ### You only need this when you are not using the tidy_lm_posthoc function
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em")
```


```{r}
antibody_bugs %>%
  filter(antibody %in% (summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1) %>% pull(antibody) %>% unique())) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=median_dysbiosis, y=value, color=age_group)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method="lm") +
    facet_wrap(~antibody, scales="free_y") +
    scale_color_viridis(end=0.8, discrete=T) +
    theme_clean()
```


### Auto-antibodies

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(presence = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=presence, y=median_dysbiosis, color=age_group)) +
    geom_boxplot(ourlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody) +
    scale_color_viridis(end=0.8, discrete=T) +
    theme_clean()
```


```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_auto %>%
  mutate(present = ifelse(value_orj > 0, "Present", "Absent")) %>%
  
  group_by(study_group_death, antibody, age_group) %>%
  mutate(perc_present = sum(present %in% "Present") / n()) %>%
  mutate(Keep = perc_present > 0 & perc_present < 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Keep) %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(median_dysbiosis ~ present, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("present", "Absent - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
  
```



## Correlation with relative abundance

```{r}


antibody_Hflu <- antibody_bugs %>%
  filter(antibody %in% "H. influenzae") %>%
  left_join(props_toTest_npop %>% 
              filter(Taxa %in% "Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae") %>%
              select(subject_id, Taxa, props, props_log),
            by="subject_id"
  )
  


antibody_Hflu %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=value, y=props, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method="lm") +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10", labels=scales:::percent) +
    scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, scales="free_x", ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      x="Antibodies against H. flu", color="",
      y="Relative abundance"
    )
ggsave("perch_Hflu_relAb_antibody.pdf", height=2.5, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```

Linear model between relative abundance and antibodies against H flu

```{r}
antibody_Hflu %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(props_log ~ value_log, data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept", term)) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)
```


```{r}
antibody_Hflu %>%
  group_by(age_group, study_group_death) %>%
  do(tidy(cor.test(.$props_log, .$value_log, method="spearman"))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #filter(!grepl("Intercept", term)) %>%
  group_by(age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-method) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)



```



## Fig 4D: Look into RSV specifically

```{r fig.width=8}
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(antibody_category %in% "RSV") %>%
  mutate(pathogen_clean = fct_relabel(pathogen_clean, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=pathogen_clean, y=value, color=study_group_death)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    facet_grid(age_group ~ antibody) +
    theme_clean() +
    labs(
      x="Etiology",
      color=""
    )
```

```{r}
antibody_toTest %>%
  filter(antibody_category %in% "RSV") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=value, fill=study_group_death, alpha=isDeath)) +
    geom_density(alpha=0.9) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_death) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values=c(0.4,0.9)) +
    theme_clean() +
    #theme(aspect.ratio = 1.25) +
    guides(alpha="none") +
    labs(
      y="", fill="",
      x=""
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4D_RSV_antibody.pdf", height=2.4, width=10, useDingbats=F)
```


## Look into vaccination status

```{r}
vaccine_of_interest <- data_frame(
  antibody = c("Measles Nucleoprotein", "Mumps Nucleoprotein", "Rubella E1", "H. influenzae", "Bordetella pertusis (Adenylate Cyclase)", "Bordetella pertusis (Pertactin autotransporter protein)"),
  vaccine = c("vaccine_Measles", "vaccine_Measles", "vaccine_Measles", "vaccine_Hflu", "vaccine_DPT", "vaccine_DPT")
)

antibody_vaccine <- antibody_toTest %>%
  select(SampleID, subject_id, study_group_death, age_group, antibody, panel, antibody_category, value, starts_with("vaccine")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=starts_with("vaccine"), names_to = "vaccine", values_to="vaccine_status") %>%
  right_join(vaccine_of_interest, by=c("antibody", "vaccine")) %>%
  mutate(vaccine_status = fct_collapse(vaccine_status, 
                                       `Fully vaccinated`=c("Fully vaccinated", "Fully vaccinated (>= 1 dose)"),
                                       `Not vaccinated`=c("Not vaccinated (0 doses)", "Not vaccinated", "Too young to be vaccinated (any child < 10 months [10.5 months in Bangladesh] not vaccinated)"),
                                       `Partially vaccinated`=c("Partially vaccinated", "Partially vaccinated (1 or 2 doses)"))) %>%
  mutate(vaccine_status = factor(vaccine_status, levels=c("Not vaccinated", "Partially vaccinated", "Fully vaccinated"))) %>%
  mutate(value_orj = value) %>%
  mutate(value = ifelse(value==0, 0.1, value)) %>%
  mutate(value_log = log10(value))
  
```

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=15}
antibody_vaccine %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_group, y=value, color=vaccine_status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    facet_wrap(~antibody) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") +
    guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))+
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
```


```{r fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
antibody_vaccine %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relabel(study_group_death, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=value, color=vaccine_status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    facet_grid(age_group~antibody) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))+
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
```



```{r }
antibody_vaccine %>%
  filter(vaccine %in% "vaccine_Hflu") %>%
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relabel(study_group_death, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=value, color=vaccine_status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0) +
    geom_quasirandom(dodge.width=0.75) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    scale_color_viridis(option="mako", discrete=T, end=0.7) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      #aspect.ratio = 1.25
    ) +
    labs(
      x="",
      y="Antibody levels against\nH. influenzae"
    )
ggsave("perch_Fig4E_Hflu_antibody.pdf", height=3, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


For each age group: value ~ study_group_death

All the tests are done with the "death" group as the reference

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_vaccine %>%
  #filter(age_group != "0-5 months") %>%
  filter(!(age_group %in% "0-5 months" & vaccine %in% "vaccine_Measles")) %>%
  
  mutate(study_group_death = fct_relevel(study_group_death, "Death", after=0)) %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  do(tidy(lm(value_log ~ vaccine_status + study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(alpha ~ study_group_collapse_control, data=.), "study_group_collapse_control")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  select(-statistic) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=7}

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(estimate = -estimate) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("Death - ", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, -estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    #scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$study_group_collapse_control) +
    facet_grid(.~age_group, space="free", scales="free") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
```



Now we are excluding the subjects who died.

For each age group: value_log ~ study_group_death

```{r}
summaries_df <- antibody_vaccine %>%
  
  filter(!(age_group %in% "0-5 months" & vaccine %in% "vaccine_Measles")) %>%
  
  filter(!study_group_death %in% "Death") %>%
  
  group_by(age_group, antibody, panel) %>%
  
  # for regular linear models
  #do(tidy(lm(value ~ study_group_death, data=.))) %>%
  do(tidy_lm_posthoc(lm(value_log ~ vaccine_status + study_group_death, data=.), "study_group_death")) %>%
  
  # for linear mixed effects models
  #do(tidy(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), effect="fixed")) %>%
  #do(tidy_lm_posthoc(nlme::lme(alpha ~ study_group, random=~1|subject_id, data=., na.action=na.omit), "study_group")) %>%
  
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("study_group_death", "Death - ", term)) %>%
  #mutate(term = sub("age_group", "0-5 months - ", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, age_group) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

#summaries_df %>%
#  select(-statistic) %>%
#  kable_style(fdr, 0.1)
```



```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=3}

summaries_df %>%
  
  filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%
  #filter(grepl("Control", term)) %>%
  #droplevels() %>%
  
  group_by(antibody) %>%
  mutate(num_sig = any(fdr<0.1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(num_sig) %>%
  
  mutate(antibody = reorder(antibody, estimate)) %>%
  mutate(isSig = ifelse(fdr < 0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.1")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x=estimate, y=antibody, color=term, shape=isSig)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype=2) +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=estimate-std.error, xmax=estimate+std.error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(16,1)) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") +
    #scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$age_group) +
    facet_wrap(~age_group, ncol=4) +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      x="Log difference between groups",
      y="", color="", shape=""
    )
#ggsave("perch_Fig4D_diffAb_2.pdf", height=2.5, width=6.5, useDingbats=F)
```


# Figure 5: Summary

```{r fig.height=10}



fig5_props <- props_toTest_npop %>%
  select(SampleID, props, Taxa) %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% c("Pseudomonadota Haemophilus influenzae",
                     "Pseudomonadota Enterobacteriaceae",
                     "Bacillota Streptococcus lactarius",
                     "Bacillota Streptococcus parasanguinis",
                     "Bacillota Streptococcus thermophilus",
                     "Bacillota Streptococcus vestibularis",
                     "Bacteroidota Prevotella histicola",
                     "Actinomycetota Bifidobacterium longum"
                     )) %>%
  mutate(taxa_group = ifelse(grepl("Streptococcus", Taxa), "BF associated", Taxa)) %>%
  group_by(SampleID, taxa_group) %>%
  summarize(props = sum(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from="taxa_group", values_from="props")

fig5_antibody <- antibody_toTest %>%
  select(ParticipantID=subject_id, antibody, value) %>%
  filter(antibody %in% "RSV-F Protein") %>%
  select(ParticipantID, `RSV antibody`=value)

s_npop %>%
  mutate(study_group = fct_collapse(study_group_death, Pneumonia=c("Severe case", "Very severe case"))) %>%
  select(SampleID, ParticipantID, study_group, age_months, Shannon, Dysbiosis=median_dysbiosis) %>%
  left_join(fig5_props, by="SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fig5_antibody, by="ParticipantID") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=Shannon:`RSV antibody`, names_to="variable") %>%
  mutate(variable = gsub(" ", "\n", variable)) %>%
  mutate(variable = factor(variable)) %>%
  mutate(variable = fct_relevel(variable, "BF\nassociated", after=0)) %>%
  mutate(variable = fct_relevel(variable, "Dysbiosis", after=0)) %>%
  mutate(variable = fct_relevel(variable, "Shannon", after=0)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=age_months, y=value, color=study_group)) +
    geom_smooth() +
    #geom_point() +
    facet_grid(variable~., scales="free") +
    theme_clean() +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0)
    )

ggsave("perch_Fig5.pdf", height=10, width=8, useDingbats=F)
```


# Contig analysis

```{r}
data_contig <- file.path(data_dir, "perch_assembly_data")

kraken_dir <- file.path(data_contig, "kraken")
bakta_dir <- file.path(data_contig, "bakta")
bakta_dir2 <- file.path(data_contig, "bakta_contigs")
```

```{r}
s_toTest <- s_npop
```




```{r eval=F}
## kraken contig information
kraken_results <- s_toTest %>%
  select(SampleID) %>%
  mutate(FileName = file.path(kraken_dir, paste0(SampleID, "-raw.tsv"))) %>%
  group_by(FileName) %>%
  mutate(fileSize = file.info(FileName)$size) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(fileSize > 30) %>% # delete empty files
  group_by(SampleID, FileName) %>%
  #do(read.delim(file.path(kraken_dir, .$FileName), stringsAsFactors = F, sep='\t')) %>%
  do(read_delim(.$FileName, delim='\t', col_names=F, col_types="ccddc")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #mutate(SampleID = sub("-raw.tsv", "", FileName, perl=T)) %>%
  #mutate(SampleID = sub(kraken_dir, "", SampleID)) %>%
  select(-FileName) %>%
  select(-X5) %>%
  setNames(c("SampleID", "Classified", "contig", "taxid", "contig_length"))

library(taxonomizr)
taxa <- unique(kraken_results$taxid)
taxonomy <- getTaxonomy(taxa,'/Users/tanesc/Documents/DBs/taxonomizr/20240325_taxonomizr/accessionTaxa.sql')
taxonomy <- as.data.frame(taxonomy) %>%
  select(-domain) %>%
  mutate(taxid = as.numeric(rownames(taxonomy)))


kraken_results <- kraken_results %>%
  left_join(taxonomy, by="taxid")
```



```{r eval=F}
## contig coverage information
contig_coverage_all <- data_frame(FileName = list.files(
  data_contig, pattern="contigs_coverage.txt")) %>%
  group_by(FileName) %>%
  do(read.delim(file.path(data_contig, .$FileName), stringsAsFactors = F, sep=',')) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #mutate(SampleID = sub("_1.txt", "", FileName, perl=T)) %>%
  select(-FileName)

contig_coverage <- contig_coverage_all %>%
  rename(SampleID=sample) %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_toTest$SampleID)
```


```{r eval=F}
## bakta results
bakta_contigs <- s_toTest %>%
  select(SampleID) %>%
  mutate(FileName = file.path(bakta_dir2, paste0(SampleID, ".contigs.tsv"))) %>%
  group_by(FileName) %>%
  mutate(fileSize = file.info(FileName)$size) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(fileSize > 0) %>% # delete empty files
  group_by(SampleID, FileName) %>%
  do(read_delim(.$FileName, delim='\t', col_names = F, col_types="cc")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #mutate(SampleID = sub(".contigs.tsv", "", FileName, perl=T)) %>%
  select(-FileName) %>%
  setNames(c("SampleID", "contig_bakta", "contig"))


bakta_results <- s_toTest %>%
  select(SampleID) %>%
  mutate(FileName = file.path(bakta_dir, paste0(SampleID, ".tsv"))) %>%
  group_by(FileName) %>%
  mutate(fileSize = file.info(FileName)$size) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(fileSize > 30) %>% # delete empty files
  group_by(SampleID, FileName) %>%
  #do(read.delim(file.path(bakta_dir, .$FileName), stringsAsFactors = F, sep='\t')) %>%
  do(read_delim(.$FileName, delim='\t', skip=5, col_types="ccddcccc")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #mutate(SampleID = sub(".tsv", "", FileName, perl=T)) %>%
  select(-FileName) %>%
  rename(contig_bakta = "#Sequence Id") %>%
  select(SampleID, everything()) %>%
  left_join(bakta_contigs, by=c("SampleID", "contig_bakta"))



```


```{r eval=F}
## to calculate RPKM from coverage we would do
## reads / (length/1000) / (nonhost/10^6)
## (coverage*length/125) / (length/1000) / (nonhost/10^6)
## (coverage*length/125) * (10^9/(length*nonhost))
## (coverage /nonhost) * (10^9/125)

bakta_rpkm <- bakta_results %>%
  #filter(Gene %in% genes_of_interest_names) %>%
  left_join(contig_coverage, by=c("SampleID", "contig")) %>%
  left_join(kraken_results, by=c("SampleID", "contig")) %>%
  left_join(select(s_toTest, SampleID, nonhost), by="SampleID") %>%
  mutate(RPKM = mean / nonhost) %>%
  mutate(RPKM = RPKM * 10^9 / 125)
```


```{r eval=F}
contig_coverage %>%
  left_join(kraken_results, by=c("SampleID", "contig")) %>%
  filter(family %in% "Enterobacteriaceae") %>%
  #filter(genus %in% "Haemophilus") %>%
  group_by(SampleID, species) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  right_join(select(s_toTest, "SampleID"), by="SampleID") %>%
  
  mutate(mean = ifelse(mean==0 | is.na(mean), 0.01, mean)) %>%
  
  left_join(select(s_toTest, SampleID, study_group_death, age_group), by="SampleID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=mean)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0) +
    geom_quasirandom() +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") +
    facet_wrap(~age_group) +
    theme_clean()
```


```{r}
# find the samples with high levels of Enterobacteriacea and check the contigs for those samples

high_entero_samples <- summed_props %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("Taxa") %>% 
  pivot_longer(-Taxa, names_to="SampleID", values_to="props") %>%
  filter(Taxa %in% "Pseudomonadota Enterobacteriaceae") %>%
  right_join(select(s, SampleID, nonhost, study_group, death, sample_type), by="SampleID") 

high_entero_samples %>%
  filter(props > 0.1)
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2)
  pull(SampleID)





  
```

```{r eval=F}
contig_coverage %>%
  left_join(kraken_results, by=c("SampleID", "contig")) %>%
  filter(family %in% "Enterobacteriaceae") %>%
  #filter(genus %in% "Haemophilus") %>%
  group_by(SampleID, species) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  #filter(!is.na(species)) %>%
  right_join(high_entero_samples, by="SampleID") %>%
  arrange(-props, -mean) %>%
   View()
  #right_join(select(s_toTest, "SampleID"), by="SampleID") %>%
  
  mutate(mean = ifelse(mean==0 | is.na(mean), 0.01, mean)) %>%
  
  left_join(select(s_toTest, SampleID, study_group_death, age_group), by="SampleID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=study_group_death, y=mean)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0) +
    geom_quasirandom() +
    scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") +
    facet_wrap(~age_group) +
    theme_clean()
```
